profiles.name_zh: 三星晶圓代工（三星電子）
profiles.strategy_en: Samsung attacks TSMC as the only other foundry with 2nm GAA in production, using aggressive pricing, a memory+logic+packaging turnkey bundle (HBM4 base dies made in-house), and US-based capacity at Taylor, Texas to court American customers like Tesla and Qualcomm. It has frozen its SF1.4 push to 2029 and concentrated everything on stabilizing SF2/SF2P yields to convert its $16.5B+ Tesla AI5/AI6 anchor deal into a credible leading-edge alternative.
profiles.strategy_zh: 三星是台積電之外唯一量產2奈米GAA的晶圓代工廠，以激進報價、記憶體＋邏輯＋封裝一站式方案（HBM4基礎裸晶自製），以及德州泰勒廠的美國本土產能，爭取特斯拉、高通等美系客戶。其已將SF1.4延後至2029年，全力穩定SF2／SF2P良率，要把165億美元以上的特斯拉AI5／AI6錨定大單轉化為可信的先進製程第二選擇。

threat.rationale_en: Foundry returned to profitability in 4Q25 with share up to 7.1%, Tesla is reportedly asking to more than double AI6 wafer volumes, and SF2P ramps in H2 2026 — but 2nm yields (~50-60% vs TSMC >80%) still wobble enough that Qualcomm is reportedly hedging back toward TSMC.
threat.rationale_zh: 代工事業4Q25轉虧為盈、市占升至7.1%，特斯拉傳出要求AI6晶圓投片量倍增，SF2P將於2026下半年放量；但2奈米良率（約50-60%，台積電逾80%）仍不穩，傳高通已考慮把重心移回台積電。

customers.name: Tesla
customers.relationship_en: $16.5B 2025 deal: AI6 autonomous-driving chip sole-sourced on SF2/SF2P+ at Taylor, AI5 split with TSMC; Tesla reportedly asked to lift monthly wafers from 16K to 40K — Samsung's anchor leading-edge customer and very sticky through 2030s.
customers.relationship_zh: 2025年165億美元大單：AI6自駕晶片獨家交由泰勒廠SF2／SF2P+生產，AI5與台積電分單；傳特斯拉要求月投片量從1.6萬片增至4萬片，為三星先進製程錨定客戶，黏著度極高。

customers.name: Qualcomm
customers.relationship_en: In advanced talks since Jan 2026 for a 2nm Snapdragon variant (first AP order in ~3 years, starting ~1K wpm), but reportedly reconsidering and tilting back to TSMC on 2nm yield instability — low stickiness, dual-source bargaining chip.
customers.relationship_zh: 2026年1月起就2奈米Snapdragon版本深入洽談（約三年來首張AP訂單，初期月投片約1千片），但因2奈米良率不穩，傳已考慮重回台積電——黏著度低，屬雙供應商議價籌碼。

customers.name: Samsung System LSI (Exynos)
customers.relationship_en: Captive customer: Exynos 2600 is the first SF2 2nm product (Galaxy S26, ~25% of lineup vs Snapdragon's 75%), Exynos 2800 tape-out targeted for 2026 — guaranteed volume that seeds yield learning.
customers.relationship_zh: 集團自家客戶：Exynos 2600為首款SF2 2奈米產品（Galaxy S26約25%機型採用，其餘75%為Snapdragon），Exynos 2800目標2026年下線——保底投片量，用以累積良率學習曲線。

customers.name: Nvidia
customers.relationship_en: Legacy 8nm logic relationship (Tegra-class SoC for Nintendo Switch 2 console volume); leading-edge GPU business remains at TSMC, so wallet share is mature-node only and not sticky at the edge.
customers.relationship_zh: 8奈米成熟製程舊有合作（任天堂Switch 2主機所用Tegra級SoC，量大）；尖端GPU仍在台積電，故僅分到成熟節點訂單，先進製程黏著度低。

customers.name: Google
customers.relationship_en: Long-time Tensor SoC foundry partner (G1-G4), but Tensor moved to TSMC from G5 onward — a churned marquee account Samsung is trying to win back with SF2P pricing.
customers.relationship_zh: 長期Tensor SoC代工夥伴（G1-G4），但自G5起Tensor已轉單台積電——屬流失的指標客戶，三星正以SF2P價格優勢試圖爭回。

recent_moves.headline_en: Q1 2026 results: foundry targets full advanced-node utilization, SF2P ramp in H2 2026
recent_moves.headline_zh: 2026年第1季財報：代工事業目標先進製程產線滿載，SF2P下半年放量
recent_moves.detail_en: Samsung said the Foundry Business plans full utilization of advanced-node lines in Q2 2026 with earnings improvement on HBM4 base-die supply, will ramp second-gen 2nm (SF2P) for mobile in H2 2026, is pursuing large-scale 2nm customers, and keeps 1.4nm on track (2029).
recent_moves.detail_zh: 三星表示代工事業2026年第2季先進製程產線將達滿載，並靠HBM4基礎裸晶供應改善獲利；SF2P第二代2奈米下半年為行動產品放量，持續爭取大型2奈米客戶，1.4奈米維持2029年時程。

sources.title: Samsung Electronics Announces First Quarter 2026 Results

recent_moves.headline_en: Taylor, Texas fab holds equipment move-in ceremony for Tesla AI5/AI6 on 2nm
recent_moves.headline_zh: 德州泰勒廠舉行裝機典禮，將以2奈米生產特斯拉AI5／AI6
recent_moves.detail_en: Samsung kicked off final equipment installation at the Taylor fab (reported ~90% ready), the run-up to 2nm mass production of Tesla's AI chips; Korean media put full mass production in early 2027 with SF2P+ being installed.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 三星泰勒廠展開最後階段裝機（傳已完成約90%），為特斯拉AI晶片2奈米量產暖身；韓媒指全面量產落在2027年初，並導入SF2P+製程。

recent_moves.headline_en: Qualcomm reportedly rethinks Samsung 2nm as yields slip back
recent_moves.headline_zh: 傳三星2奈米良率下滑，高通考慮重心移回台積電
recent_moves.detail_en: Trade press reported Samsung's 2nm yield stability deteriorated, prompting Qualcomm to consider shifting its weight back to TSMC for next-gen Snapdragon — a warning sign for Samsung's marquee comeback order.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 媒體報導三星2奈米良率穩定性轉差，高通考慮將下一代Snapdragon重心移回台積電——對三星指標性回歸訂單是一大警訊。

三星良率問題未解 傳高通考慮重心移回台積電

recent_moves.headline_en: TrendForce: Samsung Foundry back to profit in 4Q25, share up to 7.1%
recent_moves.headline_zh: TrendForce：三星代工4Q25轉虧為盈，市占升至7.1%
recent_moves.detail_en: TrendForce reported Samsung Foundry revenue grew 6.7% QoQ to ~$3.4B in 4Q25 on new 2nm shipments and HBM4 logic dies, returning to profitability and lifting share from 6.8% to 7.1% (TSMC: 70.4%).
recent_moves.detail_zh: TrendForce指出三星代工4Q25營收季增6.7%至約34億美元，受惠新2奈米產品出貨與HBM4邏輯裸晶，重返獲利，市占由6.8%升至7.1%（台積電70.4%）。

sources.title: AI Demand Drives 4Q25 Global Top 10 Foundries Revenue Up 2.6% QoQ; Samsung Gains Share, Says TrendForce

recent_moves.headline_en: Tesla reportedly asks Samsung to more than double AI6 wafer volume to 40K wpm
recent_moves.headline_zh: 傳特斯拉要求三星AI6投片量倍增至每月4萬片
recent_moves.detail_en: Korean media reported Tesla asked Samsung to raise monthly AI6 wafer starts from the originally contracted 16,000 to 40,000 (+24,000), even as the Taylor fab's full mass production slips to early 2027.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 韓媒報導特斯拉要求三星將AI6月投片量由原簽約的1.6萬片追加2.4萬片至4萬片；同時泰勒廠全面量產時程遞延至2027年初。

recent_moves.headline_en: Qualcomm in advanced talks for 2nm Snapdragon at Samsung — first AP order in 3 years
recent_moves.headline_zh: 高通與三星深入洽談2奈米Snapdragon代工——三年來首張AP訂單
recent_moves.detail_en: Qualcomm was reported in advanced talks to put a 2nm Snapdragon variant at Samsung Foundry, with design work wrapping in Q2 2026 and initial output around 1,000 wpm (~15% of Samsung's estimated 2nm capacity).
recent_moves.detail_zh: 報導指高通與三星就2奈米Snapdragon版本深入洽談，設計工作預計2026年第2季完成，初期月投片約1千片（約占三星2奈米估計產能15%）。

sources.title: Qualcomm in Advanced Talks with Samsung for 2nm Snapdragon Chip Production

nodes.note_en: In HVM since late 2025 with Exynos 2600 (Galaxy S26) as lead product — roughly time-parity with TSMC N2, but yields reported ~50-60% vs TSMC's 80%+, which is the real gap.
nodes.note_zh: 2025年底量產，首發產品為Exynos 2600（Galaxy S26），時程與台積電N2約略同步，但良率傳約50-60%，遠低於台積電逾80%——真正差距在良率。

nodes.note_en: Ramping for mobile in H2 2026 per Q1 earnings; press claims of a 70% yield milestone in early 2026 contrast with April reports of renewed instability that spooked Qualcomm.
nodes.note_zh: 依第1季法說，2026下半年為行動產品放量；2026年初媒體稱良率達70%里程碑，但4月又傳良率回落、令高通卻步，說法分歧。

nodes.note_en: Being installed at Taylor, Texas for Tesla AI5/AI6; full mass production reported for early 2027 — trails TSMC A16 (H2 2026) for comparable HPC ground.
nodes.note_zh: 正導入德州泰勒廠，供特斯拉AI5／AI6；傳2027年初全面量產，對標台積電A16（2026下半年）仍落後。

nodes.note_en: Pushed from 2027 to 2029 to concentrate on 2nm yield stabilization; Samsung's Q1 2026 release says it remains 'on track' — about a year behind TSMC A14 (2028).
nodes.note_zh: 由2027年延後至2029年，先全力穩定2奈米良率；三星2026年第1季財報稱進度「如期」——較台積電A14（2028年）落後約一年。

nodes.note_en: World-first GAA family (SF3E 2022) but weak external uptake; mostly Exynos and smaller customers, well behind TSMC N3's customer base.
nodes.note_zh: 全球首個GAA家族（SF3E於2022年），但外部客戶採用偏弱，多為Exynos與中小型客戶，客戶規模遠不及台積電N3。

nodes.node: SF4 family (4nm, incl. HBM4 base die)
nodes.note_en: Workhorse node now strategically重要 as the logic/base die for Samsung HBM4 — a foundry+memory bundle TSMC cannot replicate; also serving auto and mid-range AP demand.
nodes.note_zh: 主力成熟先進節點，現為三星HBM4邏輯／基礎裸晶載體——記憶體＋代工綁售為台積電無法複製的組合；亦承接車用與中階AP需求。

corrections.fix_en: Remove or caveat Google in the customers list: Google moved Tensor production to TSMC from Tensor G5 (2025, N3E) onward, with Tensor G6 (2026) also at TSMC and a long-term TSMC partnership reportedly through ~2029; Google is no longer a leading-edge Samsung Foundry customer (only legacy Tensor G4-and-earlier volumes remain).
corrections.fix_zh: 客戶名單中的 Google 應移除或加註：Google 自 Tensor G5（2025 年，N3E）起已轉單台積電，Tensor G6（2026 年）亦由台積電代工，且傳出與台積電簽訂至約 2029 年的長期合作；Google 已非三星先進製程客戶（僅剩 Tensor G4 以前的舊製程量產）。

corrections.fix_en: Caveat Nvidia in the customers list: as of June 2026 Nvidia is only a legacy-node Samsung Foundry customer (Tegra T239 for Nintendo Switch 2 on 8nm); Samsung 2nm (SF2/SF2P) for Nvidia GPUs is still in evaluation/courtship per reports, not a booked advanced-node order.
corrections.fix_zh: 客戶名單中的 Nvidia 應加註：截至 2026 年 6 月，Nvidia 僅是三星成熟製程客戶（任天堂 Switch 2 的 Tegra T239，8 奈米）；三星 2 奈米（SF2/SF2P）爭取 Nvidia GPU 訂單仍處於評估／洽談階段，並非已確定的先進製程訂單。

corrections.fix_en: SF2P+ timing: Samsung's July 2025 announcement targeted SF2P+ (3rd-gen 2nm, >20% performance uplift) mass production in 2026, not 2027; SF2X (HPC) and SF2Z (with BSPDN) are the ~2026-2027 entries. Suggest splitting the 'SF2P+ / SF2X (2027)' row: SF2P+ → 2026, SF2X → 2026-2027.
corrections.fix_zh: SF2P+ 時程：三星 2025 年 7 月官方說法是 SF2P+（第三代 2 奈米，效能提升逾 20%）目標 2026 年量產，而非 2027 年；SF2X（HPC 版）與 SF2Z（含背面供電）才是約 2026–2027 年的節點。建議將「SF2P+ / SF2X（2027）」拆開：SF2P+ → 2026 年，SF2X → 2026–2027 年。

profiles.strategy_en: Intel attacks TSMC as the only US-owned leading-edge alternative: 18A (first node combining gate-all-around RibbonFET with PowerVia backside power) is now in volume production in Arizona, and Intel is converting geopolitical pressure — a ~10% US government equity stake, Nvidia's $5B investment and Washington's "don't depend on Taiwan" framing — into second-source deals with Microsoft, Amazon, the DoD and now Apple. The 14A node with High-NA EUV is positioned as the head-on challenger to TSMC A14 in 2028, but management will only build 14A capacity against firm external commitments, expected to land from H2 2026. Meanwhile Intel still hedges its own products by outsourcing Nova Lake compute tiles to TSMC N2, underlining that the threat is strategic and political more than near-term volume.
profiles.strategy_zh: 英特爾以「唯一美國本土先進製程」為核心訴求進攻台積電：18A（全球首個同時導入RibbonFET環繞閘極與PowerVia背面供電的節點）已在亞利桑那量產，並把地緣政治壓力——美國政府約10%持股、輝達50億美元入股、華府「不能依賴台灣」的論述——轉化為微軟、亞馬遜、美國國防部乃至蘋果的第二供應來源訂單。14A搭配High-NA EUV瞄準2028年與台積電A14正面對決，但管理層堅持有外部客戶承諾才擴建14A產能（預期2026下半年起落定）。同時英特爾自家Nova Lake運算晶粒仍委由台積電N2代工，顯示其威脅目前偏戰略與政治面，而非短期出貨量。

threat.rationale_en: 18A is shipping with backside power before TSMC's A16 and 14A roughly matches A14 timing, while US-government ownership and tariff politics give Intel unmatched leverage to pull American customers; but external foundry revenue is still only ~0.5% of the market ($174M in Q1 2026), foundry losses run $2.4B a quarter, and Intel itself outsources Nova Lake tiles to TSMC N2 — so the threat is rising fast but not yet material to TSMC's volumes.
threat.rationale_zh: 18A已搶在台積電A16之前量產背面供電，14A時程約與A14同步，加上美國政府持股與關稅政治給予英特爾拉攏美系客戶的獨特籌碼；但其外部代工營收僅約全球0.5%（2026年Q1為1.74億美元）、代工部門每季仍虧24億美元，且自家Nova Lake晶粒仍委託台積電N2，威脅快速上升但尚未實質侵蝕台積電出貨。

customers.name: Microsoft
customers.relationship_en: Flagship external 18A/18A-P customer: next-gen Maia 2 AI accelerator contracted to Intel Foundry (reported Jan 2026), on top of the 2024 custom-chip agreement; sticky if Maia 2 ramps in Arizona/Ohio through 2026-27.
customers.relationship_zh: 18A/18A-P旗艦外部客戶：新一代Maia 2 AI加速器交由英特爾代工（2026年1月報導），延續2024年客製晶片協議；若Maia 2於亞利桑那/俄亥俄順利量產，黏著度將大幅提高。

customers.name: Apple
customers.relationship_en: Preliminary agreement reached May 2026: entry-level M-series chips (MacBook Air / iPad Pro class, ~15-20M units/yr per Ming-Chi Kuo) on 18A-P from 2027 as a US-based second source; higher-end chips stay at TSMC, so stickiness is real but deliberately capped.
customers.relationship_zh: 2026年5月達成初步協議：入門級M系列晶片（MacBook Air／iPad Pro等級，郭明錤估每年1,500-2,000萬顆）自2027年起採18A-P，作為美國本土第二供應來源；高階晶片仍留在台積電，黏著度真實但刻意設限。

customers.name: Amazon
customers.relationship_en: AWS multi-year framework since Sept 2024: AI fabric chip on 18A plus custom Xeon on Intel 3; strategically sticky as AWS diversifies US-based supply, though volumes remain modest.
customers.relationship_zh: AWS自2024年9月起的多年期合作框架：AI fabric晶片採18A，另有Intel 3客製Xeon；在AWS分散美國本土供應的策略下黏著度高，但量仍有限。

customers.name: Nvidia
customers.relationship_en: $5B equity holder (~4%) and NVLink x86 co-design partner since Sept 2025; Intel builds Nvidia-custom x86 CPUs and RTX-chiplet SoCs, and Nvidia is evaluating Intel Foundry for future GPUs (Feynman-era, ~2028) — a validation play more than committed wafer volume today.
customers.relationship_zh: 2025年9月起持有約4%股權（50億美元）並合作NVLink x86共同設計；英特爾為輝達生產客製x86 CPU與RTX小晶片SoC，輝達並評估未來GPU（約2028年Feynman世代）交英特爾代工——目前屬背書性質多於實際投片承諾。

customers.name: US Department of Defense
customers.relationship_en: RAMP-C / Secure Enclave programs put trusted defense designs on 18A; combined with the US government's ~10% equity stake, this is the stickiest, most politically protected customer relationship Intel has.
customers.relationship_zh: RAMP-C／Secure Enclave計畫將國防可信設計放上18A；加上美國政府約10%持股，是英特爾最具黏著度、政治保護最強的客戶關係。

customers.name: MediaTek
customers.relationship_en: Mature-node customer (Intel 16) since 2022 for smart-edge products; low volume, low stickiness, but a proof point that Intel can serve fabless customers.
customers.relationship_zh: 2022年起的成熟製程（Intel 16）客戶，用於智慧邊緣產品；量小、黏著度低，但證明英特爾可服務無晶圓廠客戶。

recent_moves.headline_en: Apple and Intel reach preliminary foundry agreement for entry M-series on 18A-P
recent_moves.headline_zh: 蘋果與英特爾達成初步代工協議，入門M系列採18A-P
recent_moves.detail_en: After a year of talks, Apple agreed in principle to have Intel build its lowest-end M-series chips (MacBook Air / iPad Pro class) on 18A-P, with small-scale runs in 2026 and shipments from ~Q2-Q3 2027; Kuo estimates 15-20M chips/year. It is Apple's first crack in near-total TSMC reliance, driven by US-manufacturing geopolitics.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 經一年談判，蘋果原則上同意由英特爾以18A-P代工最低階M系列晶片（MacBook Air／iPad Pro等級），2026年小規模試產、約2027年Q2-Q3出貨；郭明錤估每年1,500-2,000萬顆。這是蘋果對台積電近乎全依賴的首道裂口，動力來自美國製造的地緣政治考量。

sources.title: Apple reportedly strikes deal for Intel to make some of its chips
Apple-Intel Foundry Deal Could Reshape U.S. Chip Manufacturing - EE Times

recent_moves.headline_en: Q1 2026 results: foundry loss narrows to $2.4B; 18A defect density hits target; two prospective 14A customers
recent_moves.headline_zh: 2026年Q1財報：代工虧損收斂至24億美元；18A缺陷密度達標；14A有兩家潛在客戶
recent_moves.detail_en: Intel Foundry posted $5.4B revenue (external $174M) with a $2.4B operating loss, improving $72M QoQ. Management said 18A defect density reached manufacturing targets (profitable yields by end-2026), stepped up 14A spending, and confirmed two prospective 14A customers on PDK 0.5 with commitment decisions expected H2 2026-H1 2027 — capacity will only be built against firm commitments.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 英特爾代工營收54億美元（外部1.74億美元），營業虧損24億美元，季減7,200萬美元。管理層表示18A缺陷密度已達製造目標（2026年底前達獲利良率）、加碼14A投資，並確認有兩家潛在14A客戶正使用0.5版PDK，預期2026下半年至2027上半年做出承諾決定——產能僅在取得確定承諾後才擴建。

recent_moves.headline_en: Microsoft Maia 2 AI accelerator contracted to Intel Foundry on 18A/18A-P
recent_moves.headline_zh: 微軟Maia 2 AI加速器確定交英特爾18A/18A-P代工
recent_moves.detail_en: Reports confirmed Intel Foundry secured Microsoft's next-gen Maia 2 AI processor on 18A/18A-P, making Microsoft the flagship external customer for the node and bringing hyperscaler AI silicon production to Arizona/Ohio — work TSMC would otherwise have likely won.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 報導證實英特爾拿下微軟新一代Maia 2 AI處理器的18A/18A-P代工訂單，微軟成為該節點旗艦外部客戶，超大規模業者的AI晶片生產落腳亞利桑那／俄亥俄——這原本很可能是台積電的訂單。

sources.title: Intel Foundry secures contract to build Microsoft's Maia 2 next-gen AI processor on 18A/18A-P node, claims report
Microsoft wants to use Intel 18A for new AI chip - Techzine

recent_moves.headline_en: Panther Lake (Core Ultra Series 3) launches at CES — first AI-PC platform built on 18A
recent_moves.headline_zh: Panther Lake（Core Ultra Series 3）於CES發表——首個18A打造的AI PC平台
recent_moves.detail_en: Intel launched Core Ultra Series 3 at CES 2026, designed and manufactured in the US on 18A at Fab 52 Arizona, with retail systems from Jan 27, 2026; U-series shipped first, H-series ramping through Q2-Q3. It is the proof-of-life for 18A HVM, though yields stay below cost targets until end-2026.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 英特爾於CES 2026發表Core Ultra Series 3，在美國設計並於亞利桑那Fab 52以18A製造，2026年1月27日起上市；U系列先出貨，H系列於Q2-Q3放量。此為18A量產的存活證明，但良率成本要到2026年底才達標。

sources.title: CES 2026: Intel Core Ultra Series 3 Debut as First Built on Intel 18A - Intel Newsroom
Intel Unveils Panther Lake Architecture: First AI PC Platform Built on 18A - Intel Newsroom

recent_moves.headline_en: Nvidia invests $5B in Intel and launches NVLink x86 co-design partnership
recent_moves.headline_zh: 輝達50億美元入股英特爾，啟動NVLink x86共同設計合作
recent_moves.detail_en: Nvidia bought ~214.7M Intel shares at $23.28 (~4% stake, closed Dec 2025) and the firms agreed to co-develop NVLink-connected data-center x86 CPUs and consumer SoCs with RTX chiplets; Nvidia is also evaluating Intel Foundry for future GPUs (Feynman, ~2028). The stake is now worth over $25B and anchored Intel's funding stack alongside the US government's ~10% and SoftBank's $2B.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 輝達以每股23.28美元買進約2.147億股英特爾（約4%股權，2025年12月交割），雙方共同開發NVLink連接的資料中心x86 CPU與整合RTX小晶片的消費級SoC；輝達並評估未來GPU（約2028年Feynman）交英特爾代工。該持股現值逾250億美元，與美國政府約10%持股、軟銀20億美元共同構成英特爾的資金後盾。

sources.title: NVIDIA and Intel to Develop AI Infrastructure and Personal Computing Products - NVIDIA Newsroom
Nvidia takes $5 billion stake in Intel under September agreement - CNBC

nodes.note_en: HVM at Fab 52 Arizona since Oct 2025; first node anywhere combining GAA (RibbonFET) + backside power (PowerVia). Defect density hit manufacturing targets in Q1 2026 but profitable yields not expected until end-2026; carriers: Panther Lake, Clearwater Forest Xeon, MSFT Maia 2, AWS fabric chip, DoD. Roughly N2-class density; ~1 quarter behind N2's yield/cost maturity.
nodes.note_zh: 2025年10月起於亞利桑那Fab 52量產；全球首個同時採用GAA（RibbonFET）與背面供電（PowerVia）的節點。2026年Q1缺陷密度達製造目標，但獲利良率要到2026年底；產品含Panther Lake、Clearwater Forest Xeon、微軟Maia 2、AWS fabric晶片與國防部。密度約當N2等級，良率成熟度落後N2約1季。

nodes.note_en: Performance-enhanced 18A for external customers; PDK 1.0/1.1 releases in 2026. Apple (entry M-series, ramp 2027) and Microsoft Maia 2 are the anchor designs — the node that decides whether Intel's external foundry is real. Compares to TSMC N2P.
nodes.note_zh: 面向外部客戶的18A效能強化版；PDK 1.0/1.1於2026年釋出。蘋果（入門M系列，2027年放量）與微軟Maia 2為錨定設計——此節點將決定英特爾外部代工是否成真。對標台積電N2P。

nodes.note_en: First node designed for High-NA EUV with PowerDirect direct-contact backside power; risk production 2027, HVM ~2028, head-to-head with TSMC A14. Two prospective external customers on PDK 0.5; Intel will only build capacity against firm commitments expected H2 2026-H1 2027.
nodes.note_zh: 首個為High-NA EUV設計的節點，搭載PowerDirect直接接觸式背面供電；2027年風險試產、約2028年量產，與台積電A14正面對決。兩家潛在外部客戶使用0.5版PDK；英特爾堅持取得確定承諾（預期2026下半年至2027上半年）才擴建產能。

nodes.note_en: Last FinFET node, HVM since 2024 (Granite Rapids Xeon, AWS custom Xeon); offered externally with healthy yields, but ~7 quarters behind TSMC N3's late-2022 HVM and far smaller ecosystem.
nodes.note_zh: 最後一代FinFET節點，2024年起量產（Granite Rapids Xeon、AWS客製Xeon）；對外開放且良率穩健，但落後台積電N3的2022年底量產約7季，生態系規模差距大。

nodes.note_en: Mature 16nm-class specialty node (MediaTek smart-edge); complemented by the Intel-UMC 12nm joint platform targeted for 2027 production in Arizona.
nodes.note_zh: 成熟16奈米級特殊製程（聯發科智慧邊緣產品）；另與聯電合作開發12奈米平台，目標2027年於亞利桑那投產。

nodes.note_en: Cancelled in 2024 to concentrate resources on 18A; Arrow Lake tiles shifted to TSMC instead — emblematic of Intel's continued reliance on TSMC for its own products (Nova Lake compute tiles on TSMC N2 in 2026).
nodes.note_zh: 2024年取消以集中資源於18A；Arrow Lake晶粒改交台積電——象徵英特爾自家產品仍依賴台積電（2026年Nova Lake運算晶粒採台積電N2）。

corrections.fix_en: Intel 16 production year should be Q4 2025, not 2023 — the node only reached high-volume manufacturing in Q4 2025 with MediaTek as anchor customer, and MediaTek revenue starts booking from Q1 2026.
corrections.fix_zh: Intel 16 量產年份應為 2025 年第四季而非 2023 年——該製程於 2025 年 Q4 才進入大量生產（HVM），錨定客戶為聯發科，聯發科營收自 2026 年 Q1 起才開始入帳。

corrections.fix_en: Q1 2026 recent-move wording: Intel did NOT say 18A defect density 'hit target' — management said 18A yields beat internal plan and the year-end yield target is now expected to be achieved by mid-2026; yields/defect density specifics were explicitly not disclosed. Also '14A two prospective customers' is wrong — the call said 'multiple customers actively evaluating' 14A (PDK evaluations), with early design commitments expected 2H26–1H27; no customer count was given. The $2.4B foundry loss figure is correct.
corrections.fix_zh: 2026 年 Q1 動態措辭需修正：英特爾並未宣稱 18A 缺陷密度「達標」——管理層僅表示 18A 良率優於內部計畫、年底良率目標預計提前至 2026 年中達成，且明確不揭露良率/缺陷密度細節。另外「14A 兩家潛在客戶」有誤——法說會原話為「多家客戶正積極評估」14A（PDK 評估中），早期設計承諾預計 2026 下半年至 2027 上半年浮現，並未給出客戶數量。27 億美元中之 24 億美元晶圓代工虧損數字本身正確。

corrections.fix_en: Nvidia should not be listed as a confirmed Intel Foundry customer. The $5B investment and NVLink x86 co-design deal (Sept 2025) cover Intel-built x86 CPU products, not foundry wafers. Foundry engagement is only at the reported/evaluation stage (DigiTimes: Feynman I/O die possibly on 18A/14A with EMIB packaging; some reports say 18A testing was paused). Recommend tagging Nvidia as 'prospective/evaluating'.
corrections.fix_zh: Nvidia 不應列為已確認的英特爾晶圓代工客戶。50 億美元投資與 NVLink x86 共同設計協議（2025 年 9 月）屬於英特爾 x86 CPU 產品合作，並非代工訂單；代工部分僅停留在媒體報導/評估階段（DigiTimes：Feynman I/O die 可能採用 18A/14A 與 EMIB 封裝；亦有報導稱 18A 測試一度暫停）。建議將 Nvidia 標註為「潛在/評估中」客戶。

corrections.fix_en: Microsoft Maia 2 on 18A/18A-P should be labeled 'reportedly contracted' — the claim comes from trade-press supply-chain reports (Oct 2025, Tom's Hardware); neither Intel nor Microsoft has made a product-level confirmation that Maia 2 is on 18A/18A-P.
corrections.fix_zh: 微軟 Maia 2 採用 18A/18A-P 應標註為「據報導已簽約」——此消息來自產業媒體供應鏈報導（2025 年 10 月，Tom's Hardware）；英特爾與微軟均未在產品層級正式確認 Maia 2 採用 18A/18A-P。

corrections.fix_en: Intel 3 gap value of 7 looks wrong if gap = years behind the TSMC equivalent node: TSMC N3 entered HVM in late 2022 and Intel 3 in 2024, implying a gap of roughly 2 years, not 7.
corrections.fix_zh: Intel 3 的 gap 值 7 疑有誤：若 gap 定義為落後台積電同級製程的年數，台積電 N3 於 2022 年底量產、Intel 3 於 2024 年量產，差距約 2 年而非 7 年。

corrections.fix_en: Market share 0.5% should be labeled as the TrendForce 3Q25 figure (~$223M external foundry revenue): Intel did not appear in TrendForce's 4Q25 top-10 ranking (released March 2026), and no newer Intel-specific share number has been published as of 2026-06-11.
corrections.fix_zh: 0.5% 市占率應標註為 TrendForce 2025 年 Q3 數據（外部代工營收約 2.23 億美元）：TrendForce 2026 年 3 月發布的 4Q25 前十大代工排名中英特爾未入榜，截至 2026-06-11 尚無更新的英特爾市占數字。

profiles.strategy_en: SMIC attacks TSMC on two fronts: at the trailing edge it leverages China's domestic-substitution policy and 20-40% price discounts to pull mature-node orders (PMIC, CIS, MCU, driver ICs) away from TSMC, UMC, VIS and GlobalFoundries; at the leading edge it uses DUV multi-patterning to build a de-Americanized 7nm/5nm pipeline that captures Huawei, Alibaba and Chinese AI-accelerator orders TSMC is legally barred from serving. Beijing is reportedly funding a fivefold expansion of 7nm/5nm-class output within two years, accepting low yields and operating losses as the cost of strategic autonomy.
profiles.strategy_zh: 中芯國際從兩面進攻台積電：在成熟製程端，挾中國國產替代政策與最高 20-40% 的降價，把電源管理、CIS、MCU、驅動 IC 等訂單從台積電、聯電、世界先進與格羅方德手中搶走；在先進製程端，以 DUV 多重曝光打造「去美化」的 7 奈米／5 奈米產線，承接台積電依法無法服務的華為、阿里巴巴等中國 AI 晶片訂單。北京更傳出計畫兩年內將 7／5 奈米級產能擴大五倍，以低良率與營運虧損換取戰略自主。

threat.rationale_en: N+3 5nm-class DUV production (Kirin 9030) proves SMIC is only ~1 node behind where many expected it to stall, but yields around one-third of TSMC's and no EUV cap its commercial reach; the real threat is geopolitical — a captive, state-funded China market that structurally removes orders from TSMC/UMC's addressable base.
threat.rationale_zh: N+3 五奈米級 DUV 量產（麒麟 9030）證明中芯並未如預期停滯，但良率僅約台積電三分之一、又無 EUV，商業競爭力受限；真正威脅在地緣政治——受國家資金支持的封閉中國市場，正結構性地把訂單從台積電與聯電的可服務市場中移除。

customers.name: Huawei (HiSilicon)
customers.relationship_en: Effectively exclusive foundry for Kirin smartphone SoCs (Kirin 9030 on N+3 5nm-class) and Ascend AI accelerators (910B/910C on N+2 7nm-class); maximally sticky — no legal alternative exists for Huawei.
customers.relationship_zh: 實質獨家代工華為麒麟手機 SoC（N+3 五奈米級的麒麟 9030）與昇騰 AI 加速器（N+2 七奈米級的 910B/910C）；黏著度最高——華為在法規下別無選擇。

customers.name: Qualcomm
customers.relationship_en: Long-standing mature-node customer for 28nm-and-above PMIC and RF front-end dies serving China-bound handsets; price-driven, moderately sticky.
customers.relationship_zh: 長期成熟製程客戶，於 28 奈米以上代工供應中國市場手機的電源管理與射頻前端晶片；以價格為導向，黏著度中等。

customers.name: UNISOC (紫光展銳)
customers.relationship_en: Entry/mid-range smartphone and IoT SoCs on 12/22/28nm; domestic-substitution flagship account that previously dual-sourced with TSMC.
customers.relationship_zh: 中低階手機與物聯網 SoC 採 12／22／28 奈米；國產替代指標客戶，過去曾與台積電雙重下單。

customers.name: GigaDevice (兆易創新)
customers.relationship_en: NOR flash and MCU wafers on 55/40nm specialty nodes; sticky through co-developed process IP and localization mandates.
customers.relationship_zh: 於 55／40 奈米特殊製程代工 NOR Flash 與 MCU；因共同開發製程 IP 與在地化政策而黏著度高。

customers.name: OmniVision / Will Semiconductor (韋爾股份)
customers.relationship_en: CIS logic and stacked sensor wafers on 28/40nm; volume shifting from TSMC/overseas foundries under localization pressure.
customers.relationship_zh: 於 28／40 奈米代工 CIS 邏輯與堆疊式感測晶圓；在在地化壓力下訂單持續從台積電與海外代工廠移轉。

customers.name: Cambricon (寒武紀)
customers.relationship_en: Domestic AI accelerator designer using SMIC advanced nodes after losing TSMC access via the US entity list; captive customer.
customers.relationship_zh: 中國 AI 加速器設計公司，因美國實體清單失去台積電產能後改用中芯先進製程；屬被迫綁定的客戶。

customers.name: Alibaba (T-Head)
customers.relationship_en: Reported next-generation AI inference chips (PPU line) slated for SMIC 5nm-class capacity alongside Huawei; early-stage but strategically significant traction.
customers.relationship_zh: 傳其下一代 AI 推論晶片（PPU 系列）將與華為共用中芯五奈米級產能；尚屬早期，但戰略意義重大。

recent_moves.headline_en: US$6bn SMNC buyout clears final regulatory hurdle
recent_moves.headline_zh: 60 億美元收購中芯北方通過最後監管關卡
recent_moves.detail_en: China's CSRC approved SMIC's issuance of 547.2 million A-shares at RMB 74.20 to buy out the remaining 49% of Beijing fab unit SMNC (including the Big Fund's stake), consolidating its most advanced 12-inch capacity under full control.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 中國證監會核准中芯以每股人民幣 74.20 元發行 5.472 億股 A 股，收購北京中芯北方剩餘 49% 股權（含大基金持股），將最先進的 12 吋產能完全收歸旗下。

sources.title: China's SMIC clears final hurdle for US$6 billion takeover of SMNC

recent_moves.headline_en: Q1 2026: revenue +11.5% YoY to US$2.51bn, profit misses; capacity tops 1.078M wpm
recent_moves.headline_zh: 2026 年第一季營收年增 11.5% 達 25.1 億美元、獲利不如預期；月產能突破 107.8 萬片
recent_moves.detail_en: Net profit rose 5% to US$197M (below consensus), gross margin 20.1%; growth driven by power management, industrial and automotive localization demand while smartphone share hit its lowest since 2021. Q2 revenue guided to US$2.86-2.91bn (+~14% QoQ).
recent_moves.detail_zh: 淨利成長 5% 至 1.97 億美元（低於市場預期），毛利率 20.1%；成長動能來自電源管理與工業、車用的國產化需求，手機營收占比則創 2021 年以來新低。第二季營收展望 28.6 至 29.1 億美元（季增約 14%）。

sources.title: SMIC Q1 Net Profit Up 5%, Misses Forecasts; Smartphone-Related Revenue Share Hits Lowest Since 2021

recent_moves.headline_en: TrendForce: SMIC holds #3 global foundry spot with ~5.4% share in 4Q25
recent_moves.headline_zh: TrendForce：中芯以約 5.4% 市占穩居全球晶圓代工第三
recent_moves.detail_en: 4Q25 revenue of US$2.49bn (+4.5% QoQ) on localization demand, higher shipments and slightly better ASPs — versus TSMC at 70.4% and Samsung at 7.1% of top-10 foundry revenue.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 受惠國產化需求、出貨量增加與 ASP 微升，4Q25 營收 24.9 億美元（季增 4.5%）；同期台積電市占 70.4%、三星 7.1%。

sources.title: AI Demand Drives 4Q25 Global Top 10 Foundries Revenue Up 2.6% QoQ, Says TrendForce

recent_moves.headline_en: Beijing reportedly targets fivefold boost in 7nm/5nm-class output within two years
recent_moves.headline_zh: 傳北京目標兩年內將 7／5 奈米級產出擴大五倍
recent_moves.detail_en: FT-sourced reports say China plans to lift advanced (7nm/5nm-performance) wafer output to ~100,000 wpm from under 20,000 within one to two years, led by SMIC and Hua Hong, primarily to feed Huawei Ascend AI accelerator demand.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 外媒（金融時報）報導，中國計畫一至兩年內將 7／5 奈米級先進晶圓產出從不到 2 萬片提升至約 10 萬片／月，由中芯與華虹主導，主要供應華為昇騰 AI 加速器需求。

sources.title: China Reportedly Aims to Boost 7nm, 5nm Output Fivefold in Two Years, Driven by SMIC, Hua Hong

recent_moves.headline_en: Announces RMB 40.6bn (US$5.79bn) buyout of remaining 49% of Beijing unit SMNC
recent_moves.headline_zh: 宣布以人民幣 406 億元（57.9 億美元）收購中芯北方剩餘 49% 股權
recent_moves.detail_en: All-share deal with five SMNC shareholders including the China IC Industry Investment Fund ('Big Fund'), aligning SMIC's key Beijing 12-inch fabs with national AI-chip objectives and simplifying state-capital structure.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 以全股份方式向包含國家集成電路產業投資基金（大基金）在內的五名股東收購，使北京 12 吋關鍵廠區與國家 AI 晶片戰略對齊，並簡化國資股權結構。

sources.title: China's SMIC to take full control of unit SMNC in $5.8 billion deal
SMIC acquires remaining stake in SMNC for USD 5.8 billion

recent_moves.headline_en: N+3 5nm-class node reaches mass production on DUV-only flow; Huawei Kirin 9030 first product
recent_moves.headline_zh: N+3 五奈米級製程以純 DUV 多重曝光達成量產；首發產品為華為麒麟 9030
recent_moves.detail_en: China's most advanced node without any EUV tools entered volume production, one full generation ahead of the N+2 7nm-class used for Ascend; yield is estimated at roughly one-third of TSMC's equivalent with ~50% higher cost, implying Kirin 9030 ships at an operating loss.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 中國最先進、完全不用 EUV 的製程節點進入量產，較生產昇騰晶片的 N+2 七奈米級領先一個世代；估計良率僅約台積電同級製程三分之一、成本高出約五成，麒麟 9030 恐處於虧損出貨狀態。

sources.title: 中芯國際以 DUV 多重曝光量產 5 奈米製程
Chinese SMIC Achieves 5 nm Production on N+3 Node Without EUV Tools

nodes.note_en: Volume production declared Dec 2025 for Huawei Kirin 9030; yield estimated at ~1/3 of TSMC N5 with ~50% higher die cost — strategically vital, commercially loss-making. Slated for Huawei/Alibaba next-gen AI chips from 2026.
nodes.note_zh: 2025 年 12 月宣布量產，首發華為麒麟 9030；估計良率僅台積電 N5 約三分之一、晶粒成本高五成——戰略意義重大但商業上虧損。2026 年起將承接華為、阿里下一代 AI 晶片。

nodes.note_en: Workhorse for Huawei Ascend 910B/910C AI accelerators and Kirin 9000-series; Ascend yields reported in the 20-40% range. Capacity is the binding constraint — advanced-node capacity ~45k wpm end-2025, targeted ~60k in 2026.
nodes.note_zh: 華為昇騰 910B/910C 與麒麟 9000 系列的主力製程；昇騰良率傳僅 20-40%。產能為最大瓶頸——先進製程產能 2025 年底約 4.5 萬片／月，2026 年目標約 6 萬片。

nodes.note_en: First DUV 7nm-class node (Kirin 9000S breakthrough lineage); now largely superseded by N+2 for new designs but proved the multi-patterning playbook under export controls.
nodes.note_zh: 首個 DUV 七奈米級節點（麒麟 9000S 突破之源）；新案多已轉向 N+2，但驗證了出口管制下多重曝光的可行路徑。

nodes.note_en: First FinFET generation; ramp constrained after 2020 US entity listing, modest volumes serving domestic SoC and automotive compute.
nodes.note_zh: 首代 FinFET；2020 年列入美國實體清單後擴產受限，量不大，主要服務本土 SoC 與車用運算。

nodes.note_en: Reported all-domestic R&D team targeting a 3nm-class flow without EUV; Huawei's 'tau scaling' roadmap claims equivalent-1.4nm by 2031. Timeline and economics unproven — watch item, not yet a node.
nodes.note_zh: 傳已組建純國產研發團隊，目標無 EUV 的三奈米級流程；華為「τ 縮放定律」路線圖宣稱 2031 年達等效 1.4 奈米。時程與經濟性皆未經驗證，屬觀察項目。

nodes.node: 28nm HKMG & specialty (55/40nm BCD, CIS, RF, driver IC)
nodes.note_en: The revenue engine: ~1.08M wpm total capacity with ~40k wpm 12-inch adds guided through end-2026, weaponized with 20-40% price cuts to pull China PMIC/CIS/MCU orders from TSMC, UMC, VIS and GlobalFoundries.
nodes.note_zh: 營收主引擎：總產能約 108 萬片／月，並規劃至 2026 年底再增約 4 萬片 12 吋月產能，搭配 20-40% 降價搶奪台積電、聯電、世界先進與格羅方德的中國電源管理／CIS／MCU 訂單。

corrections.fix_zh: N+3 標示為「5nm 級」宜加註：TechInsights 拆解 Kirin 9030 後認定 N+3 實為介於 7nm 與 5nm 之間的漸進式微縮（金屬間距激進縮放導致良率挑戰），並非完整 5nm 等效節點；建議改為「N+3（介於7/5nm之間、DUV多重曝光，媒體通稱5nm級）」。其餘欄位（4Q25 約5.4%市佔/全球第三、Q1 2026 營收25.1億美元+11.5%、獲利1.974億美元低於預期、產能1.078M wpm、SMNC 人民幣406億收購於2026年5月獲證監會核准、北京擬兩年內將7/5nm產出提升五倍至10萬片/月）均經查證屬實。
corrections.fix_en: The 'N+3 (5nm-class)' label needs a hedge: TechInsights' Kirin 9030 teardown characterizes N+3 as an incremental shrink sitting between 7nm and 5nm (with yield challenges from aggressive metal-pitch scaling), not a true 5nm-equivalent — suggest 'N+3 (between 7nm/5nm, DUV multi-patterning; press shorthand 5nm-class)'. All other fields verified as of 2026-06-11: ~5.4% share / #3 in TrendForce 4Q25, Q1 2026 revenue $2.51bn +11.5% YoY with $197.4M profit miss, capacity 1.078M wpm, RMB 40.6bn SMNC buyout cleared CSRC approval in May 2026, and the reported fivefold 7/5nm output target (to ~100K wpm in ~2 years) per Nikkei.

profiles.hq_zh: 日本東京（晶圓廠位於北海道千歲市）
profiles.strategy_en: Rapidus is a Japan-government-backed greenfield challenger that skips legacy nodes and goes straight to 2nm GAA using IBM-licensed technology and imec EUV know-how, differentiating on fully single-wafer processing and AI-driven short turnaround time (RUMS) rather than scale. Backed by roughly JPY 2.35T in state R&D support and Tokyo's economic-security agenda, it targets 2027 mass production to become a non-Taiwan leading-edge second source, courting US AI-chip designers (IBM, Tenstorrent, reportedly GAFAM-class firms) and Japanese HPC players rather than fighting TSMC head-on for Apple/Nvidia volume.
profiles.strategy_zh: Rapidus 是日本政府全力扶植的新創晶圓代工，跳過成熟節點直攻 2 奈米 GAA，技術源自 IBM 授權與 imec EUV 合作，主打全單片晶圓處理與 AI 驅動短交期（RUMS），以速度而非規模做差異化。它倚靠約 2.35 兆日圓國家研發資金與經濟安全保障政策，目標 2027 年量產，定位為台灣以外的先進製程第二來源，鎖定美系 AI 晶片設計商（IBM、Tenstorrent，傳聞含 GAFAM 級大廠）與日本 HPC 業者，而非正面爭奪蘋果、輝達的大單。

threat.rationale_en: Working 2nm GAA prototypes and a claimed 237 MTr/mm2 density near TSMC N2 show real progress, but with zero revenue, one pilot fab, unproven yield and no signed anchor customer, Rapidus is at best a 2029-2030 threat; its real leverage today is Japanese state money and economic-security sourcing pressure.
threat.rationale_zh: 2 奈米 GAA 原型已通電且宣稱密度 237 MTr/mm2 接近台積電 N2，技術進展屬實；但營收為零、僅一座試產線、良率未經驗證、尚無正式錨定客戶，最快也要 2029–2030 年才構成實質威脅，目前最大籌碼是日本國家資金與經濟安保採購壓力。

customers.name: Tenstorrent
customers.relationship_en: First announced partner (Nov 2023): joint 2nm IP development for edge-AI accelerators under the LSTC/NEDO project; named by CEO Koike as a lead prospective customer with prototyping from 2026 — strategic but pre-volume.
customers.relationship_zh: 首家公開合作夥伴（2023 年 11 月）：在 LSTC／NEDO 計畫下共同開發 2 奈米邊緣 AI 加速器 IP；社長小池淳義點名為最領先的潛在客戶，2026 年起試產，屬策略性合作、尚無量產訂單。

customers.name: IBM
customers.relationship_en: Core 2nm technology licensor (Albany joint development, ~150 Rapidus engineers trained) and flagged as a lead prospective customer for its own AI/HPC silicon; deepest, stickiest relationship Rapidus has.
customers.relationship_zh: 2 奈米核心技術授權方（奧巴尼共同開發，約 150 名 Rapidus 工程師赴美受訓），同時被點名為自家 AI／HPC 晶片的領先潛在客戶，是 Rapidus 最深、黏著度最高的關係。

customers.name: Quadric
customers.relationship_en: Edge-AI GPNPU IP company partnered (Nov 2024) to port its Chimera processor to Rapidus 2nm, seeding the design ecosystem for edge-AI customers; ecosystem play, not volume.
customers.relationship_zh: 邊緣 AI GPNPU IP 公司，2024 年 11 月合作將 Chimera 處理器移植到 Rapidus 2 奈米，為邊緣 AI 客戶鋪設計生態系，屬生態系布局而非大量訂單。

customers.name: Fujitsu
customers.relationship_en: Investor in the Feb 2026 round and positioned by METI/NEDO as a 'future customer' via funded design projects for next-gen HPC/AI processors (post-Fugaku lineage) — government-orchestrated demand.
customers.relationship_zh: 2026 年 2 月增資的股東之一，並由經產省／NEDO 透過設計補助計畫定位為「未來客戶」，開發次世代 HPC／AI 處理器（富岳後繼血統），屬政府撮合的需求。

recent_moves.headline_en: Completes additional JPY 150B government funding round via IPA
recent_moves.headline_zh: 完成 IPA 追加 1,500 億日圓政府增資
recent_moves.detail_en: The Information-technology Promotion Agency (IPA, under METI) injected another JPY 150B (~USD 0.94B) of equity, bringing cumulative IPA investment to JPY 424.95B, funding the push from pilot line to 2027 mass production.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 經產省轄下情報處理推進機構（IPA）再注資 1,500 億日圓（約 9.4 億美元），IPA 累計出資達 4,249.5 億日圓，支應從試產線邁向 2027 年量產。

recent_moves.headline_en: METI approves extra JPY 631.5B, lifting total state R&D support to ~JPY 2.35T
recent_moves.headline_zh: 經產省再批 6,315 億日圓，國家研發支援累計約 2.35 兆日圓
recent_moves.detail_en: FY2026 money goes mainly to prototype refinement and front-end processing at IIM-1; NEDO will also fund design projects with Fujitsu and IBM Japan positioned as future Rapidus customers to build demand before mass production.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 2026 年度資金主要用於 IIM-1 原型改良與前段製程；NEDO 並補助富士通、日本 IBM 的設計案，定位為 Rapidus 未來客戶，在量產前先創造需求。

recent_moves.headline_en: Secures JPY 267.6B from IPA and 32 private companies; says 60+ customers in talks
recent_moves.headline_zh: 獲 IPA 與 32 家民間企業共 2,676 億日圓；洽談客戶逾 60 家
recent_moves.detail_en: JPY 100B from IPA plus JPY 167.6B from 32 firms including Canon, DBJ, Fujitsu, NTT, SoftBank and Sony; CEO Koike said Rapidus is in active talks with 60+ companies designing AI, robotics and edge chips.
recent_moves.detail_zh: IPA 出資 1,000 億日圓，加上佳能、日本政策投資銀行、富士通、NTT、軟銀、索尼等 32 家企業共 1,676 億日圓；小池社長稱正與逾 60 家 AI、機器人、邊緣運算晶片設計公司洽談。

recent_moves.headline_en: Reported plan for second Hokkaido fab (IIM-2) targeting 1.4nm production in 2029
recent_moves.headline_zh: 傳規劃北海道第二廠（IIM-2），目標 2029 年量產 1.4 奈米
recent_moves.detail_en: Japanese media reports say Rapidus is preparing a second Chitose fab to jump to 1.4nm by 2029, attempting to close the gap with TSMC's A14 (2028) within one node generation.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 日媒報導 Rapidus 籌建千歲第二廠，擬於 2029 年直攻 1.4 奈米，企圖在一個世代內拉近與台積電 A14（2028 年）的差距。

recent_moves.headline_zh: 點名 IBM、Tenstorrent 為最領先潛在客戶，並與 GAFAM 級大廠洽談
recent_moves.detail_en: CEO Koike said the two US firms will join customer-product prototyping from 2026, with 40-50 mostly American prospects in the pipeline including major US tech companies and AI-chip startups.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 小池社長表示兩家美商將自 2026 年起參與客戶產品試產，洽談中的 40–50 家潛在客戶以美企為主，包含美系科技巨頭與 AI 晶片新創。

nodes.note_en: IIM-1 Chitose pilot line running since April 2025; GAA prototypes hit electrical targets July 2025; PDK released to early customers Q1 2026, customer prototyping in 2026, mass production targeted 2027. Claimed density 237.31 MTr/mm2 vs TSMC N2's 236.17, but commercial yield entirely unproven — TSMC N2 has been in HVM since 2025H2.
nodes.note_zh: 千歲 IIM-1 試產線 2025 年 4 月啟動；2025 年 7 月 GAA 原型達成電性目標；2026 年第一季向首批客戶釋出 PDK、年內客戶試產，目標 2027 年量產。宣稱密度 237.31 MTr/mm2 與台積電 N2 的 236.17 相當，但商業良率完全未經驗證——台積電 N2 自 2025 下半年已量產。

nodes.note_en: Reported second Chitose fab targeting 1.4nm output in 2029, about a year behind TSMC A14 (2028); contingent on 2nm success and further multi-trillion-yen funding — no equipment orders confirmed yet.
nodes.note_zh: 傳聞中的千歲第二廠，目標 2029 年產出 1.4 奈米，落後台積電 A14（2028 年）約一年；前提是 2 奈米成功與後續數兆日圓資金到位，設備訂單尚未確認。

nodes.note_en: NEDO-funded chiplet and package design/manufacturing program for the 2nm generation; back-end line construction at IIM-1 planned from 2027 to offer short-TAT integrated front-to-back manufacturing — far smaller in scope than TSMC's CoWoS/SoIC ecosystem.
nodes.note_zh: NEDO 補助的 2 奈米世代小晶片與封裝設計製造計畫；規劃 2027 年起在 IIM-1 建後段產線，主打短交期前後段一貫製造，規模遠不及台積電 CoWoS／SoIC 生態系。

corrections.fix_en: Remove Quadric from the customers list — no public evidence links Quadric to Rapidus (Quadric's NPU IP deal is with Denso, Oct 2024). The verifiable early customers/prospects are Tenstorrent (first announced customer, Feb 2024), Esperanto Technologies (MOU, May 2024), Fujitsu, and IBM (prospective).
corrections.fix_zh: 應自客戶名單移除 Quadric——公開資訊中查無 Quadric 與 Rapidus 的合作（Quadric 的 NPU IP 授權對象是 Denso，2024 年 10 月）。可查證的早期客戶／潛在客戶為 Tenstorrent（2024 年 2 月首位公布客戶）、Esperanto Technologies（2024 年 5 月簽署合作備忘錄）、富士通與 IBM（潛在）。

corrections.fix_en: Fujitsu should be upgraded from prospective to committed customer: per Bloomberg/Nikkei (2026-04-11), Rapidus will manufacture Fujitsu's ultra-low-power AI processor (MONAKA-X line) starting FY2026 — this is newer and stronger than the items currently in recent_moves.
corrections.fix_zh: 富士通應由「潛在客戶」上調為「已確定客戶」：據 Bloomberg／日經（2026-04-11），Rapidus 將自 2026 年度起受託生產富士通超低功耗 AI 處理器（MONAKA-X 系列），此訊息比 recent_moves 現列各項更新、更具分量。

corrections.fix_en: 2nm timing should be stated more precisely as 2H FY2027 (i.e., late 2027 to early 2028), initial ~6,000 wpm ramping toward 20,000-25,000 wpm; '2027' alone slightly overstates readiness.
corrections.fix_zh: 2 奈米量產時程宜更精確標為 2027 會計年度下半年（即 2027 年底至 2028 年初），初期月產能約 6,000 片、規劃一年內擴至 20,000–25,000 片；僅標「2027」略嫌樂觀。

corrections.fix_en: Back-end node entry is slightly stale: the Rapidus Chiplet Solutions (RCS) packaging pilot line in Chitose entered full operation in April 2026 and assembly prototyping has begun, so status is closer to 'pilot operating' than generic 'development 2027'. RUMS is the overall service-model name, RCS is the packaging arm.
corrections.fix_zh: 後段封裝節點資訊略舊：千歲的 Rapidus Chiplet Solutions（RCS）封裝試產線已於 2026 年 4 月全面啟用並開始組裝試作，狀態應為「試產線運轉中」而非籠統的「開發中、2027」。RUMS 為整體服務模式名稱，RCS 才是封裝事業體。

corrections.fix_en: Minor nuance on the GAFAM/IBM item: Rapidus issued an official statement that media mentions of GAFAM and specific firms are illustrative, not customer disclosures; IBM remains primarily the 2nm technology-development partner, with 'lead prospective customer' status based only on T3 trade reports (Oct 2025).
corrections.fix_zh: GAFAM／IBM 一項宜加註：Rapidus 已正式聲明媒體提及 GAFAM 及特定公司僅為舉例、並非客戶揭露；IBM 目前主要仍是 2 奈米技術開發夥伴，「首要潛在客戶」之說僅出自 2025 年 10 月的 T3 產業媒體報導。

profiles.strategy_en: GlobalFoundries abandoned the leading-edge race in 2018 and instead attacks TSMC at the specialty layer: differentiated FD-SOI (22FDX), RF SOI, monolithic silicon photonics (GF Fotonix/SCALE), GaN and eMRAM platforms aimed at AI data-center connectivity, automotive, smartphone RF and aerospace/defense sockets. Its core weapon is geopolitics — as the only US-headquartered top-5 foundry with DoD Trusted Foundry status, CHIPS funding, a $16B US expansion backed by Apple, SpaceX, AMD, Qualcomm, NXP and GM, and now a US-government-funded quantum foundry, it monetizes a 'secure, US/EU-made' premium that TSMC's Arizona fabs only partially neutralize. Long-term agreements and sole-sourced design wins (95% of its 500+ photonics wins in 2025) make its sockets sticky rather than price-competitive.
profiles.strategy_zh: 格羅方德2018年退出先進製程競賽後，改以差異化特殊製程攻擊台積電：22FDX FD-SOI、RF SOI、單晶片矽光子（GF Fotonix／SCALE）、GaN與eMRAM平台，鎖定AI資料中心光連接、車用、手機射頻與航太國防插槽。其核心武器是地緣政治——作為唯一美國總部的前五大晶圓代工廠，擁有國防部信任晶圓廠認證、CHIPS補助、由蘋果、SpaceX、超微、高通、恩智浦與通用汽車背書的160億美元美國擴產，以及美國政府出資的量子晶圓廠，靠「美歐安全製造」溢價搶單，台積電亞利桑那廠僅能部分抵銷。長約與獨家設計案（2025年500多個矽光子設計案中95%為獨家）使其插槽黏性極高。

threat.rationale_en: No leading-edge capability (most advanced node is 12nm-class FinFET) and only ~3.9% share caps the direct threat, but its US-sovereignty leverage is the strongest of any foundry — DoD contracts, CHIPS/quantum funding and 'Made in America' customer commitments can peel US defense, auto and RF sockets away from TSMC's specialty and trailing nodes. Momentum is real: record 29% gross margin, photonics revenue doubling toward a $1B run-rate, first-ever dividend, and an M&A spree (MIPS, AMF, InfiniLink, Synopsys ARC IP).
threat.rationale_zh: 缺乏先進製程（最先進僅12奈米級FinFET）、市佔僅約3.9%，直接威脅有限；但其美國主權槓桿是所有代工廠中最強——國防部合約、CHIPS與量子補助、「美國製造」客戶承諾，可從台積電特殊製程與成熟節點手中搶走美國國防、車用與射頻插槽。動能確實存在：毛利率創紀錄達29%、矽光子營收倍增朝10億美元年化邁進、首度配息，並連續併購MIPS、AMF、InfiniLink與新思ARC IP。

customers.name: Apple
customers.relationship_en: Wireless connectivity and power-management ICs on RF SOI/FDX platforms; Apple publicly committed to GF's $16B US expansion (June 2025) for US-made supply — highly sticky multi-year agreement.
customers.relationship_zh: 於RF SOI／FDX平台代工無線連接與電源管理晶片；蘋果公開背書格羅方德160億美元美國擴產（2025年6月），確保美國製供應——多年期合約黏性極高。

customers.name: AMD
customers.relationship_en: Legacy wafer-supply relationship from spin-off era; still sources I/O and trailing-node chips, and joined the June 2025 US capacity commitments.
customers.relationship_zh: 自分拆時代延續的晶圓供應關係；仍採購I/O與成熟製程晶片，並參與2025年6月美國產能承諾。

customers.name: Qualcomm
customers.relationship_en: RF front-end and 5G transceiver content on RF SOI and 22FDX; long-term agreements tied to US-made RF supply.
customers.relationship_zh: 射頻前端與5G收發器採用RF SOI及22FDX；長約綁定美國製射頻供應。

customers.name: NXP
customers.relationship_en: Automotive and industrial MCUs on 40nm eMRAM (40ESF3) and FDX platforms; co-development of next-gen auto processors, deeply embedded in qualification cycles.
customers.relationship_zh: 車用與工業MCU採用40奈米eMRAM（40ESF3）及FDX平台；共同開發新一代車用處理器，深度綁定車規認證週期。

customers.name: General Motors
customers.relationship_en: Direct long-term capacity agreement (since 2023) reserving US-made auto chip supply — a foundry-to-OEM model that bypasses TSMC-centric supply chains.
customers.relationship_zh: 自2023年起直接簽訂長期產能協議，鎖定美國製車用晶片供應——車廠直連代工模式，繞過以台積電為核心的供應鏈。

customers.name: SpaceX
customers.relationship_en: Starlink user-terminal RF/beamforming chips; named partner in the $16B US expansion — space/defense-adjacent and US-sourcing driven.
customers.relationship_zh: 星鏈用戶終端射頻／波束成形晶片；160億美元美國擴產的具名夥伴——屬太空國防周邊，由美國採購需求驅動。

customers.name: Lockheed Martin
customers.relationship_en: Trusted Foundry partnership for secure US defense chips under the $3.1B 10-year DoD supply framework — sockets TSMC structurally cannot serve.
customers.relationship_zh: 信任晶圓廠合作，依31億美元十年期國防部供應框架生產安全國防晶片——此類插槽台積電結構上無法承接。

customers.name: Bosch
customers.relationship_en: Automotive radar (77GHz/120GHz) SoCs on automotive-qualified 22FDX — sticky ADAS safety-critical design wins.
customers.relationship_zh: 車規22FDX代工77GHz／120GHz車用雷達SoC——ADAS安全關鍵設計案黏性高。

recent_moves.headline_en: Completes acquisition of Synopsys' ARC processor IP business for 'physical AI' platform
recent_moves.headline_zh: 完成收購新思ARC處理器IP業務，打造「實體AI」平台
recent_moves.detail_en: Combined with the 2025 MIPS acquisition, GF now bundles processor IP with its specialty nodes to offer a holistic platform for edge/physical-AI chips — deepening customer lock-in beyond wafers.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 結合2025年收購的MIPS，格羅方德將處理器IP與特殊製程綁售，提供邊緣／實體AI晶片整體平台，將客戶鎖定從晶圓延伸到IP層。

recent_moves.headline_zh: 成立量子技術解決方案部門，獲美國商務部最高3.75億美元投資
recent_moves.detail_en: Letter of intent for direct US government investment to build a secure domestic quantum foundry serving multiple qubit modalities — extending GF's government-backed moat into a new frontier domain.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 與美國政府簽署直接投資意向書，建立支援多種量子位元技術的安全本土量子晶圓廠，將政府背書的護城河延伸至前沿新領域。

recent_moves.headline_zh: 2026投資人日：首度配息、AI導向成長藍圖、最高返還50%自由現金流
recent_moves.detail_en: Board approved inaugural $0.12 quarterly dividend (payable July 14, 2026); outlined roadmap for AI data-center scale-up (silicon photonics toward ~$1B run-rate by 2028) and physical AI, with ~40% long-term gross margin ambition.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 董事會核准每季0.12美元首次股息（2026年7月14日發放）；提出AI資料中心擴展藍圖（矽光子2028年前朝約10億美元年化營收）與實體AI戰略，長期毛利率目標約40%。

recent_moves.detail_en: Data-center peripheral demand lifted GF to a strong Q4 (TrendForce: #5, ~3.9% share); photonics expected to nearly double again in 2026 with 500+ design wins in 2025, 95% sole-sourced.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 資料中心周邊需求推升第四季表現（TrendForce：全球第五、市佔約3.9%）；矽光子2026年預期再近倍增，2025年贏得逾500個設計案、95%為獨家供應。

recent_moves.headline_en: Acquires Advanced Micro Foundry (Singapore) and InfiniLink to become largest pure-play silicon photonics foundry
recent_moves.headline_zh: 收購新加坡Advanced Micro Foundry與InfiniLink，成為最大純矽光子代工廠
recent_moves.detail_en: Back-to-back November deals (AMF announced Nov 17, InfiniLink Nov 25) add photonics fab capacity and high-speed optical interconnect design talent, aimed squarely at AI data-center optics — a lane adjacent to TSMC's COUPE/CPO push.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 11月連續兩樁交易（17日宣布AMF、25日InfiniLink），補強矽光子晶圓產能與高速光連接設計人才，直指AI資料中心光學市場——與台積電COUPE／CPO路線正面相鄰。

sources.title: GlobalFoundries Acquires Advanced Micro Foundry, Accelerating Silicon Photonics Global Leadership
GlobalFoundries to Acquire Advanced Micro Foundry, InfiniLink

nodes.note_en: Cancelled in 2018; GF permanently exited the leading-edge race and redeployed capex to differentiated specialty platforms.
nodes.note_zh: 2018年喊停，永久退出先進製程競賽，資本支出轉向差異化特殊製程平台。

nodes.note_en: GF's most advanced logic node (Malta, NY); serves edge-AI, aerospace/defense and auto compute. Roughly four years behind TSMC's comparable 12FFC-class node and ~5+ generations behind N3/N2.
nodes.note_zh: 格羅方德最先進邏輯節點（紐約馬爾他廠），用於邊緣AI、航太國防與車用運算。較台積電同級12FFC晚約四年，距N3／N2落後五代以上。

nodes.note_en: Flagship differentiated platform (Dresden); auto radar (Bosch), RF, ultra-low-power edge AI. No direct TSMC equivalent — TSMC counters with 22ULP/ULL bulk planar; MIT research partnership (Feb 2025) builds on 22FDX.
nodes.note_zh: 旗艦差異化平台（德勒斯登廠）；車用雷達（博世）、射頻、超低功耗邊緣AI。台積電無直接對應製程，以22ULP／ULL體矽平面製程應對；與MIT研究合作（2025年2月）即以22FDX為基礎。

nodes.note_en: Next-gen FD-SOI repeatedly delayed since 2016 announcement; rarely featured in current GF messaging — effectively demand-gated, low priority versus photonics and GaN.
nodes.note_zh: 新一代FD-SOI自2016年發表後一再延宕，現今官方論述甚少提及——實質上視需求而定，優先順序低於矽光子與GaN。

nodes.note_en: Monolithic RF+CMOS+optical platform; 500+ design wins in 2025 (95% sole-sourced), revenue >$200M doubling toward ~$1B by 2028; SCALE co-packaged light-engine platform launched May 2026 — GF's sharpest AI data-center wedge, adjacent to TSMC's COUPE.
nodes.note_zh: 單晶片整合射頻+CMOS+光學；2025年逾500個設計案（95%獨家），營收逾2億美元並朝2028年約10億美元倍增；2026年5月推出SCALE共封裝光引擎平台——是格羅方德切入AI資料中心最利的楔子，與台積電COUPE路線相鄰。

nodes.note_en: Automotive-grade eMRAM for MCUs (NXP and others); a specialty socket where GF competes with TSMC's 22/28nm eMRAM and UMC's 28nm offerings.
nodes.note_zh: 車規eMRAM MCU平台（恩智浦等採用）；此特殊插槽與台積電22／28奈米eMRAM及聯電28奈米方案競爭。

nodes.note_en: Market-leading RF SOI for smartphone front-end modules and 5G transceivers (Apple, Qualcomm content); main rivals are TowerJazz and UMC rather than TSMC.
nodes.note_zh: 市場領先的RF SOI，用於手機前端模組與5G收發器（蘋果、高通採用）；主要對手是Tower與聯電，而非台積電。

nodes.note_en: GaN power platform ramping at Essex Junction, VT for data-center power and automotive — a lane TSMC exited when it wound down its own GaN foundry business (2025).
nodes.note_zh: GaN功率平台於佛蒙特州Essex Junction廠爬坡，鎖定資料中心電源與車用——台積電2025年收掉自家GaN代工業務後讓出的賽道。

corrections.fix_zh: 「40ESF3 (40nm embedded MRAM)」標示錯誤：ESF3 是嵌入式 SuperFlash（eFlash，源自 Microchip/SST 授權，與英飛凌合作的 40nm 車用嵌入式快閃製程），並非 MRAM。格羅方德的 eMRAM 是建構在 22FDX 平台上，2020 年起量產。建議改為「40ESF3（40nm 嵌入式快閃，車用）」並另列「22FDX eMRAM（2020 年量產）」。
corrections.fix_en: Node "40ESF3 (40nm embedded MRAM)" is mislabeled: ESF3 is embedded SuperFlash (eFlash, Microchip/SST-licensed; the 40nm automotive embedded-flash process co-developed with Infineon), not MRAM. GF's eMRAM runs on the 22FDX platform, in volume production since 2020. Relabel as "40ESF3 (40nm embedded flash, automotive)" and list "22FDX eMRAM (production 2020)" separately.

corrections.fix_zh: 200mm GaN-on-Si 功率節點「risk_production 2025」過於樂觀：截至 2026-06，量產時程為 2026 年——GF 於 2025-11 取得台積電 650V/80V GaN 技術授權移轉至佛蒙特州 200mm 產線，與 Navitas 的合作為 2026 年初開發、2026 年下半年投產。狀態應為 development/ramping、年份 2026。
corrections.fix_en: 200mm GaN-on-Si power node "risk_production 2025" is overstated: as of 2026-06 the volume-production timeline is 2026 — GF licensed TSMC's 650V/80V GaN technology in Nov 2025 for transfer to its Vermont 200mm line, and the Navitas partnership targets development in early 2026 with production later in 2026. Status should be development/ramping with year 2026.

corrections.fix_zh: 市占率 3.9% 對應的是 TrendForce 2025 全年數據（3.87%，第 5 名）；最新單季（4Q25，2026-03-12 發布）已降至 3.6%。若欄位定義為最新季度，應更新為 3.6%。
corrections.fix_en: Market share 3.9% matches TrendForce full-year 2025 (3.87%, rank #5); the latest quarter (4Q25, published 2026-03-12) shows GF slipping to 3.6%. If the field means latest-quarter share, update to 3.6%.

profiles.strategy_en: UMC has explicitly abandoned the leading-edge race and instead attacks TSMC's mature and specialty-node franchise (22/28nm display drivers, RF-SOI, BCD power, embedded memory) with lower-cost capacity and deep customer co-development. Its geographic spread — Singapore Fab12i P3 ramping in 2026, the USJC fab in Japan, and 12nm FinFET being installed inside Intel's Arizona fabs — lets it pitch a 'non-Taiwan, non-China' supply story against both TSMC's Taiwan concentration and Chinese price-cutters. The Intel 12nm tie-up gives UMC US-made FinFET capacity without the capex, aimed squarely at customers who would otherwise default to TSMC N12/N16.
profiles.strategy_zh: 聯電已明確放棄先進製程競賽，轉而以低成本產能與深度客戶共同開發，搶攻台積電的成熟與特殊製程版圖（22/28奈米顯示驅動IC、RF-SOI、BCD電源、嵌入式記憶體）。其地理布局——新加坡Fab12i P3於2026年量產、日本USJC廠，以及在英特爾亞利桑那廠導入的12奈米FinFET——讓聯電能以「非台灣、非中國」的供應故事，同時對抗台積電的台灣集中度與中國同業的殺價競爭。與英特爾的12奈米合作使聯電不需自行投入巨額資本支出即可取得美國製FinFET產能，直接瞄準原本只能選擇台積電N12/N16的客戶。

threat.rationale_en: No threat at the leading edge (capped at 12nm, and only via Intel's fabs from 2027), but UMC is a genuine competitor for TSMC's mature/specialty revenue: 22nm hit a record 14% of its Q1 2026 sales, pricing power is returning (H2 2026 hikes), and the Intel Arizona 12nm plus Singapore/Japan footprint gives it geopolitical selling points TSMC's mature nodes lack.
threat.rationale_zh: 聯電在先進製程不構成威脅（最高僅12奈米，且需待2027年透過英特爾廠量產），但在成熟與特殊製程上是台積電的實質競爭者：22奈米占其2026年Q1營收創紀錄的14%，定價權回升（2026下半年漲價），加上英特爾亞利桑那12奈米與新加坡、日本布局，使其具備台積電成熟製程所欠缺的地緣政治賣點。

customers.name: Novatek
customers.relationship_en: Largest DDIC foundry relationship: OLED/LCD display driver ICs on UMC 28nm high-voltage and migrating to 22nm — highly sticky due to qualified HV process and panel-maker qualification chains.
customers.relationship_zh: 最大的顯示驅動IC代工關係：OLED/LCD驅動IC採用聯電28奈米高壓製程並逐步轉進22奈米——因高壓製程認證與面板廠驗證鏈而黏著度極高。

customers.name: Qualcomm
customers.relationship_en: RF-SOI RF front-end / transceiver components and PMICs on specialty mature nodes; long-running engagement where UMC's RF-SOI scale is hard to displace.
customers.relationship_zh: 在特殊成熟製程上生產RF-SOI射頻前端／收發器元件與電源管理IC；長期合作，聯電的RF-SOI規模難以被取代。

customers.name: MediaTek
customers.relationship_en: Connectivity, WiFi, TV and IoT SoCs on 22/28/40nm; MediaTek dual-sources mature nodes between TSMC and UMC, so share shifts with pricing.
customers.relationship_zh: 22／28／40奈米的連接晶片、WiFi、電視與IoT SoC；聯發科在成熟製程於台積電與聯電間雙重供貨，市占隨價格波動。

customers.name: Realtek
customers.relationship_en: Networking, audio codec and connectivity ICs on 28–40nm; a core Hsinchu-ecosystem customer with broad multi-product loyalty.
customers.relationship_zh: 28至40奈米的網通、音訊編解碼與連接IC；新竹生態系核心客戶，多產品線長期合作。

customers.name: Infineon
customers.relationship_en: Automotive microcontrollers and power/specialty devices under long-term supply agreements; automotive qualification makes the relationship sticky for years.
customers.relationship_zh: 依長期供貨協議生產車用微控制器與電源／特殊元件；車規認證使合作關係具多年黏著度。

customers.name: Denso
customers.relationship_en: JV-style partnership at USJC (Japan): first 300mm automotive IGBT line in Japan, mass production since 2023, ramping toward 10K wafers/month — locked in by joint investment.
customers.relationship_zh: 在日本USJC的準合資合作：日本首條300mm車用IGBT產線，2023年起量產並朝每月一萬片爬升——因共同投資而高度綁定。

recent_moves.headline_en: Intel 12nm program on schedule: Arizona certification by end-2026, production in 2027
recent_moves.headline_zh: 英特爾12奈米合作如期推進：2026年底完成亞利桑那廠認證，2027年量產
recent_moves.detail_en: President Jason Wang said the jointly developed 12nm FinFET node is being certified at Intel's Ocotillo, Arizona campus, with certification done by end-2026, first tape-outs late 2026 and mass production in 2027; UMC calls it a 'must-win' project.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 總經理王石表示，雙方共同開發的12奈米FinFET正在英特爾亞利桑那Ocotillo廠區進行認證，2026年底完成認證、2026年底首批設計定案、2027年量產；聯電稱此為「非贏不可」的計畫。

sources.title: 12nm program with Intel on schedule, production slated for 2027: UMC — Focus Taiwan
UMC Shrugs Off Middle East Expansion; Calls Intel's 12nm Project a Must-Win — SemiWiki

recent_moves.headline_en: Q1 2026 results: 22nm hits record 14% of revenue, H2 2026 price hike announced, buyback approved
recent_moves.headline_zh: 2026年Q1財報：22奈米占營收創紀錄的14%，宣布2026下半年漲價並通過庫藏股
recent_moves.detail_en: Revenue NT$61.04bn (+5.5% YoY), net income NT$16.17bn with EPS roughly doubling YoY; 22/28nm at 34% of sales (22nm a record 14%, 50+ tape-outs expected this year), utilization 79%, and UMC formally notified clients of foundry price increases starting H2 2026.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 營收新台幣610.4億元（年增5.5%），淨利161.7億元、EPS年增約一倍；22／28奈米占營收34%（22奈米創紀錄達14%，今年預計逾50個設計定案），產能利用率79%，並正式通知客戶自2026下半年起調漲代工價格。

sources.title: United Microelectronics Corp — Form 6-K, Q1 2026 results (SEC EDGAR)
Earnings call transcript: UMC Q1 2026 shows strong growth, stock jumps 6% — Investing.com

recent_moves.headline_en: UMC among Taiwan mature-node foundries planning price hikes of up to 10% from Q2 2026
recent_moves.headline_zh: 聯電與台系成熟製程同業擬自2026年Q2起調漲價格最高10%
recent_moves.detail_en: After two years of China-driven price erosion (SMIC had cut 28nm wafers ~40% in early 2025), UMC, VIS and PSMC reportedly prepared hikes of up to 10% from April–June as mature-node supply tightened and Chinese peers SMIC, Hua Hong and Nexchip raised prices first.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 在中國產能造成兩年價格侵蝕後（中芯國際2025年初曾將28奈米晶圓砍價約40%），隨成熟製程供給趨緊、中芯國際／華虹／晶合先行漲價，聯電、世界先進、力積電傳出自4至6月起調漲最高10%。

sources.title: UMC, VIS, PSMC Reportedly Eye Mature-Node Price Hikes Up to 10% From Apr. — TrendForce News
China's No.3 Foundry Nexchip to Hike Prices 10% from June, Following SMIC, Hua Hong — TrendForce News

recent_moves.headline_en: Intel reportedly to license Super MIM capacitor technology to UMC
recent_moves.headline_zh: 英特爾傳將授權Super MIM電容技術予聯電
recent_moves.detail_en: Beyond the 12nm fab collaboration, Intel is reportedly licensing its Super MIM capacitor technology to UMC, deepening the partnership and boosting UMC's AI-adjacent and advanced-packaging-related capability.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 在12奈米合作之外，英特爾傳將其Super MIM電容技術授權聯電，深化雙方夥伴關係，並強化聯電在AI周邊與先進封裝相關的技術能力。

sources.title: Intel May License Super MIM to UMC, Boosting AI and Advanced Packaging Capability — TrendForce News

recent_moves.headline_en: UMC orders suppliers to cut prices at least 15% from January 2026
recent_moves.headline_zh: 聯電要求供應商自2026年1月起降價至少15%
recent_moves.detail_en: UMC notified suppliers that all 2026 supply contracts must carry at least a 15% price reduction — a pre-emptive cost offensive to defend 22/28nm margins against Chinese mature-node capacity, and the cost base behind its 2026 pricing flexibility.
recent_moves.detail_zh: 聯電通知供應商2026年所有供貨合約須降價至少15%——此為因應中國成熟製程產能、保衛22／28奈米毛利的先發成本攻勢，也是其2026年定價彈性的成本基礎。

sources.title: Taiwan's UMC Reportedly to Slash Supplier Prices 15% in 2026 — Mature Node Shake-Up Ahead — TrendForce News

nodes.note_en: Jointly developed in Intel Fabs 12/22/32 at Ocotillo; certification by end-2026, tape-outs late 2026, HVM 2027. Roughly a decade behind TSMC N12/N16 in time, but its pitch is US-made capacity, not node leadership.
nodes.note_zh: 於英特爾Ocotillo廠Fab 12/22/32共同開發；2026年底完成認證、年底設計定案、2027年量產。時程上落後台積電N12/N16約十年，但賣點是美國製造產能而非製程領先。

nodes.note_en: UMC's most advanced in-house node since 2017 but never scaled — consistently a low-single-digit (often ~0%) share of revenue; effectively a capability placeholder.
nodes.note_zh: 2017年起為聯電自有最先進製程，但從未放量——營收占比長期僅低個位數（常近0%），實質上只是技術門面。

nodes.note_en: Growth engine: record 14% of Q1 2026 revenue, 50+ tape-outs expected in 2026 across OLED DDIC, RF and embedded apps; Singapore Fab12i P3 ramping 22nm volume from 2026. Broadly at parity with TSMC's 22nm specialty offering.
nodes.note_zh: 成長引擎：2026年Q1占營收創紀錄的14%，全年預計逾50個設計定案，涵蓋OLED驅動IC、射頻與嵌入式應用；新加坡Fab12i P3自2026年起量產22奈米。與台積電22奈米特殊製程大致並駕齊驅。

nodes.note_en: Workhorse node with record 22/28nm revenue in 2025; high-voltage DDIC leadership keeps utilization resilient, but this is the segment most exposed to SMIC/Nexchip/Hua Hong price pressure.
nodes.note_zh: 主力製程，22／28奈米2025年營收創新高；高壓驅動IC領先地位支撐稼動率，但也是最受中芯國際、晶合、華虹價格壓力衝擊的區塊。

nodes.note_en: Mature volume node for connectivity, MCU and consumer ICs; stable but commoditized and contested by Chinese fabs.
nodes.note_zh: 連接晶片、MCU與消費IC的成熟量產製程；穩定但已大宗商品化，面臨中國晶圓廠競爭。

nodes.note_en: Specialty differentiation: RF-SOI for Qualcomm-class RF front-ends and BCD power platforms; plus the 300mm automotive IGBT line with Denso at USJC in Japan (first in Japan, ramping since 2023).
nodes.note_zh: 特殊製程差異化：供高通級射頻前端的RF-SOI與BCD電源平台；另有日本USJC與電裝合作的300mm車用IGBT產線（日本首條，2023年起量產爬坡）。

nodes.note_en: UMC formally exited sub-12nm R&D in 2018 to pivot to specialty/mature ROI; any future advanced exposure runs through the Intel partnership, not in-house nodes.
nodes.note_zh: 聯電2018年正式退出12奈米以下研發，轉向特殊／成熟製程的投資報酬；未來任何先進製程曝險皆透過英特爾合作而非自有製程。

corrections.fix_zh: 市佔率應為 4.2% 而非 4.3%：根據 TrendForce 2026-03-12 發布的 4Q25 全球前十大晶圓代工排名，聯電以 4.2% 市佔率位居第四（3Q25 亦為 4.2%）。
corrections.fix_en: Market share should be 4.2%, not 4.3%: per TrendForce's 4Q25 top-10 foundry ranking (published 2026-03-12), UMC held fourth place with 4.2% (also 4.2% in 3Q25).

corrections.fix_zh: 22nm 節點年份標示「2026」易誤導：聯電 22eHV 平台於 2024 年 6 月發布，22nm 在 2025 年已有營收貢獻並量產爬坡；2026 年（Q1）是 22nm 營收佔比創下 14% 新高的年份，而非量產起始年。建議年份改為 2024–2025 或註明 2026 為營收佔比創高年。
corrections.fix_en: 22nm node year "2026" is misleading: UMC launched the 22eHV platform in June 2024 and 22nm was already in production and contributing revenue through 2025; 2026 (Q1) is when 22nm hit a record 14% of revenue, not the production-start year. Suggest changing the year to 2024–2025 or annotating 2026 as the record-revenue-share year.

events.product: Tesla AI6 inference chip (FSD / Optimus)
events.summary_en: In July 2025 Samsung disclosed an 8-year, $16.5B foundry contract running through 2033, and Elon Musk confirmed Samsung's Taylor, Texas fab will be 'dedicated' to Tesla's next-gen AI6 chip, with Musk saying actual volumes could be several times the contract minimum. Equipment move-in at Taylor was completed in April 2026 and Musk later confirmed AI6 will also be split with TSMC Fab 21 in Arizona, but Samsung is the anchor fab. This is Samsung Foundry's largest publicly known leading-edge win against TSMC to date.
events.summary_zh: 2025年7月三星揭露一紙為期8年、165億美元、執行至2033年的代工合約，馬斯克證實三星德州泰勒廠將「專門」生產特斯拉次世代AI6晶片，並表示實際產量可能是合約下限的數倍。泰勒廠已於2026年4月完成設備進機，馬斯克其後也證實AI6將與台積電亞利桑那Fab 21分工，但三星是主力廠。這是三星晶圓代工迄今對台積電最大的公開先進製程勝利。
events.impact_en: A flagship high-volume AI chip that would otherwise default to TSMC now anchors Samsung's US foundry ramp, giving Samsung the volume customer it needs to mature SF2 and a reference win to court other US designers.
events.impact_zh: 原本理應落在台積電的旗艦大量AI晶片，如今成為三星美國代工產能的錨定訂單，讓三星取得養熟SF2製程所需的量，並成為招攬其他美系客戶的指標案例。

sources.title: Samsung to Produce Chips for Tesla in $16.5 Billion Deal

verdict.note_en: Core event verified and T1-backed: Samsung's 2025-07-26 Korean regulatory filing disclosed the $16.5B contract through 2033, Musk confirmed Taylor is dedicated to AI6, and as of June 2026 Tesla is reportedly negotiating to raise Taylor orders from ~16K to ~40K wafers/month. Corrections: equipment move-in only began with the 2026-04-24 ceremony (not "completed"), AI6 has slipped ~6 months (MPW pushed to ~Oct 2026 on Samsung 2nm yield issues, mass production now ~late 2027-2028), and "away from TSMC" is softened by the confirmed dual-foundry split (AI6.5 at TSMC Arizona; Morgan Stanley sizes TSMC revenue impact at only ~1%), making impact_score 5 somewhat inflated.
verdict.note_zh: 核心事件屬實且有T1依據：三星2025年7月26日韓國交易所公告揭露165億美元、效期至2033年的代工合約，馬斯克證實泰勒廠專責AI6，且2026年6月當下特斯拉傳正洽談將泰勒廠訂單由月產約1.6萬片擴至4萬片。需修正處：設備進機僅於2026年4月24日「開始」而非完成；AI6因三星2奈米良率問題延後約6個月（MPW延至約2026年10月，量產推遲至2027年底~2028年）；且AI5/AI6確定由三星與台積電雙代工、AI6.5歸台積電亞利桑那廠，大摩估對台積電營收影響僅約1%，故「轉離台積電」方向與影響分數5略為高估。

events.product: Tesla AI5 self-driving / AI inference chip
events.node: Samsung SF2T (2nm-class) + TSMC 3nm-class Arizona, split production
events.summary_en: Originally slated for TSMC, AI5 became a dual-foundry program: in November 2025 Musk confirmed AI5 (and AI6) will be built at both Samsung Taylor and TSMC Fab 21 Arizona, with slightly different physical implementations of the same design. TrendForce reported in April 2026 that Samsung will run AI5 on its SF2T process ahead of AI6, with sampling possible late 2026 and volume production around 2027. Musk has publicly praised the Taylor fab as outclassing TSMC's US fabs, signaling Samsung could take a growing share.
events.summary_zh: AI5原本預定由台積電獨家代工，後轉為雙代工：馬斯克於2025年11月證實AI5（及AI6）將同時在三星泰勒廠與台積電亞利桑那Fab 21生產，同一設計做出略有差異的實體版本。TrendForce於2026年4月報導三星將以SF2T製程先行投產AI5，最快2026年底送樣、約2027年量產。馬斯克並公開稱讚泰勒廠優於台積電美國廠，暗示三星份額可能擴大。
events.impact_en: TSMC keeps part of AI5 but loses sole-source status on a marquee autonomous-driving chip; Tesla gains pricing leverage and a credible second source for all future AI silicon generations.
events.impact_zh: 台積電雖保有部分AI5訂單，卻失去這顆指標性自駕晶片的獨家地位；特斯拉取得議價籌碼，未來各代AI晶片都有可信的第二供應來源。

sources.title: Musk confirms Tesla AI5 and AI6 will be made at both Samsung and TSMC, reinforcing dual-foundry strategy
[News] Tesla AI5 Reportedly Uses SK hynix Memory, Samsung LPDDR5X; Samsung SF2T Process Applied Ahead of AI6
Musk says Samsung's Texas fab outclasses TSMC's US-based fabs

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: AI5 taped out on 2026-04-15 with Musk publicly thanking both TSMC and Samsung; the dual-foundry split (Samsung Taylor SF2T 2nm-class + TSMC Arizona 3nm-class, slightly different physical implementations) and the sampling-late-2026 / volume-2027 timeline were directly confirmed by Musk and by Samsung, with no denials or yield/cancellation reports as of 2026-06-11. Nuance: TSMC still supplies the first validation samples and reportedly gets AI6.5 on Arizona 2nm, so this is share dilution rather than a full defection.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：AI5 於 2026 年 4 月 15 日完成設計定案（tape-out），馬斯克公開感謝台積電與三星；雙代工分工（三星泰勒廠 SF2T 2 奈米級＋台積電亞利桑那 3 奈米級、實體設計略有差異）及 2026 年底送樣、2027 年量產的時程，均獲馬斯克與三星直接確認，截至 2026-06-11 無否認或良率、取消等負面消息。補充：首批驗證樣品仍由台積電供應，且 AI6.5 傳將採用台積電亞利桑那 2 奈米，故屬份額稀釋而非全面轉單。

events.product: Snapdragon 8 Elite flagship SoC (Gen 5 'for Galaxy' variant / Gen 6, 2026-2027 flagships)
events.summary_en: Qualcomm ordered 2nm Snapdragon prototypes from both Samsung and TSMC as early as February 2024, and after a mid-2025 wobble the Samsung track accelerated: at CES 2026 CEO Cristiano Amon confirmed deep negotiations with Samsung Foundry on SF2P, saying the chip design is already complete, and April 2026 reports say Qualcomm is close to choosing Samsung SF2 for the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6. This would be Qualcomm's return to Samsung after roughly five years of TSMC exclusivity, motivated by TSMC price hikes and Samsung's improving 2nm yields (reported ~60-70% on SF2/SF2P). No final mass-production contract has been publicly announced as of June 2026.
events.summary_zh: 高通早在2024年2月即同時向三星與台積電下單2奈米Snapdragon原型晶片；歷經2025年中一度喊停後，三星路線明顯加速：執行長艾蒙在CES 2026證實正與三星代工就SF2P深入談判，並表示晶片設計已完成；2026年4月報導指高通已接近決定由三星SF2生產Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6。若成局，將是高通在台積電獨家代工約五年後重返三星，動機是台積電漲價與三星2奈米良率改善（SF2/SF2P據報約60-70%）。截至2026年6月尚未公布最終量產合約。
events.impact_en: Even a partial 'for Galaxy' allocation re-establishes Samsung as a credible second source for flagship mobile SoCs and directly erodes TSMC's pricing power at 2nm/N2 with one of its top mobile customers.
events.impact_zh: 即使只是部分「for Galaxy」版本的配額，也足以讓三星重新成為旗艦手機SoC的可信第二供應商，直接削弱台積電在2奈米世代對主力手機客戶的議價能力。

sources.title: Qualcomm asks Samsung Foundry and TSMC to each build 2nm Snapdragon 8 prototypes
Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6: Qualcomm is exploring Samsung as its new manufacturing home
Qualcomm close to choosing Samsung to make 2nm Snapdragon chips

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: Amon publicly acknowledged 2nm talks with Samsung at CES 2026 and visited Samsung Foundry in April 2026, so negotiations are real — but the claim overstates progress: Samsung SF2 yield is ~55% (not 60-70%, which is TSMC's), and the latest April-June 2026 reports (Digital Chat Station, SamMobile/工商時報) say both Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 and Gen 6 Pro stay on TSMC N2P, with Samsung at most evaluating a separate variant. Status is evaluation/negotiation, not an in-progress order shift; impact_score 4 is inflated (2-3 is fairer).
verdict.note_zh: 已確認：高通執行長艾蒙於 CES 2026 公開證實與三星洽談 2 奈米代工、並於 2026 年 4 月親訪三星晶圓代工部門，洽談屬實；但原主張誇大進度——三星 SF2 良率僅約 55%（60-70% 其實是台積電的數字），且 2026 年 4-6 月最新報導指 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 標準版與 Pro 版皆續留台積電 N2P，三星至多爭取另一款衍生晶片。現況應為「評估洽談中」而非訂單轉移進行中，影響分數 4 偏高（2-3 較合理）。

events.product: Maia 2 / Maia 200-series AI accelerator (first-gen Maia 100 was TSMC N5)
events.summary_en: Microsoft was Intel Foundry's first announced 18A design customer (Satya Nadella, Intel Foundry Direct Connect, Feb 2024), and in late January 2026 multiple reports said Intel Foundry secured the contract to build Microsoft's next-gen Maia 2 AI accelerator on 18A/18A-P, moving production to Arizona and Ohio. Maia 100 was fabbed at TSMC on N5; Maia 2 on 18A-P would be the first large-scale migration of a hyperscaler AI accelerator from TSMC to Intel. Microsoft frames it as US supply-chain sovereignty; neither company has issued a formal Maia 2 press release yet.
events.summary_zh: 微軟是英特爾代工首家公布的18A設計客戶（納德拉於2024年2月Intel Foundry Direct Connect宣布），2026年1月底多家媒體報導英特爾已拿下微軟次世代Maia 2 AI加速器的18A/18A-P代工合約，生產移至亞利桑那與俄亥俄。Maia 100由台積電N5代工；Maia 2若採18A-P，將是超大規模雲端業者AI加速器首次大規模從台積電移轉至英特爾。微軟以美國供應鏈自主為訴求；兩家公司尚未發布正式新聞稿。
events.impact_en: Loses TSMC a growing hyperscaler ASIC line and hands Intel 18A its flagship external validation; if Maia 2 yields well it becomes the template other US cloud players cite for moving AI silicon onshore away from TSMC.
events.impact_zh: 台積電失去一條成長中的雲端ASIC產品線，英特爾18A則獲得旗艦級外部背書；若Maia 2良率順利，將成為其他美系雲端業者把AI晶片移回美國、移出台積電的範本。

sources.title: Intel Launches World's First Systems Foundry Designed for the AI Era (Microsoft 18A design win)
Intel Foundry secures contract to build Microsoft's Maia 2 next-gen AI processor on 18A/18A-P node, claims report
Microsoft wants to use Intel 18A for new AI chip

verdict.note_en: Largely refuted as characterized: the actual second-gen Maia (Maia 200) was officially launched 2026-01-26 on TSMC N3 and is already in production in Azure datacenters — it did NOT move to Intel; the "Maia 2 on 18A/18A-P" story is an October 2025 SemiAccurate-sourced report (T3, not T1, and misdated by the claimant as Jan 2026) that, per later reporting, concerns a future-generation Maia (Maia 3 "Griffin") still unconfirmed by either company. Microsoft remains a real announced Intel 18A customer for a custom AI inference SoC (Feb 2024 Direct Connect; reiterated on Intel 2026 earnings), so a partial future shift is plausible but rumored, and impact_score 4 is inflated since TSMC kept and expanded the flagship Maia volume.
verdict.note_zh: 事件描述大致遭推翻：微軟真正的第二代 Maia（Maia 200）已於 2026 年 1 月 26 日正式發表，採用台積電 3 奈米製程並已在 Azure 資料中心量產部署，並未轉單英特爾；「Maia 2 採 18A/18A-P」其實是 2025 年 10 月源自 SemiAccurate 的傳聞（屬 T3 而非 T1，且原主張誤植為 2026 年 1 月），後續報導指其實為更下一代 Maia 3（代號 Griffin）。微軟確為英特爾 18A 已公布的客製 AI 推論晶片客戶（2024 年 2 月 Direct Connect、2026 年法說會重申），故未來部分轉移屬可能但仍為傳聞階段，impact_score 4 偏高，因旗艦 Maia 量產仍留在台積電。

events.product: TPU AI accelerators (3M+ units reportedly ordered for 2028 output)
events.summary_en: On June 8, 2026 The Information reported, and Reuters echoed, that Google placed an order with Intel for more than 3 million TPUs to be produced through 2028 after months of validating Intel's advanced packaging; Morgan Stanley estimates that would be roughly half of Google's 2028 TPU output. Intel shares jumped ~12%, but neither company has confirmed, and JPMorgan cautioned Intel may only do EMIB packaging while TSMC still fabricates the compute dies — calling the rally 'a storm in a teacup'. Today TPUs are made at TSMC (with Broadcom/MediaTek as design partners), so even a packaging-only win would shift meaningful value off TSMC's CoWoS chain.
events.summary_zh: 2026年6月8日The Information報導（路透跟進），Google在數月驗證英特爾先進封裝後，下單逾300萬顆TPU、於2028年前生產；摩根士丹利估計約占Google 2028年TPU產出的一半。英特爾股價應聲漲約12%，但兩家公司均未證實，摩根大通提醒英特爾可能只負責EMIB封裝、運算晶粒仍由台積電代工，稱此波行情是「茶壺裡的風暴」。目前TPU由台積電生產（博通／聯發科為設計夥伴），即使僅封裝外移，也會把可觀價值移出台積電CoWoS供應鏈。
events.impact_en: If the full-fab version is true this is the single largest reported defection of AI accelerator volume from TSMC; if packaging-only, it still attacks TSMC's CoWoS moat. Needs T1 confirmation — watch Intel/Alphabet filings.
events.impact_zh: 若整顆代工為真，這將是迄今報導中最大規模的AI加速器訂單流出台積電；即使僅封裝，也直接挑戰台積電CoWoS護城河。仍待官方文件證實，需緊盯英特爾與Alphabet揭露。

sources.title: Chip Supply Shifts From TSMC: Google's Reported Intel TPU Order Lifts Foundry, but Doubts Remain
Google's Rumoured TPU Order Gives Intel Foundry Ambitions a Major Boost

verdict.note_en: Verified: The Information's 2026-06-08 report (3M+ Google TPUs at Intel for 2028) is corroborated by Reuters, Bloomberg, TrendForce and Tom's Hardware, with Intel declining to comment, shares up ~12.4%, and no official confirmation or denial as of 2026-06-11 — so "rumored"/T3 is correct. Main caveat stands: JPMorgan argues Intel's role may be EMIB packaging only while TSMC keeps fabbing the compute die (N2) and I/O die (N3), so the "away from TSMC" shift may be packaging value rather than wafer fab, which the summary already discloses.
verdict.note_zh: 已查證：The Information 2026年6月8日報導（Google 向英特爾下單逾300萬顆TPU、2028年投產）獲路透、彭博、TrendForce、Tom's Hardware 多方轉述，英特爾拒絕評論、股價漲約12.4%，截至6月11日雙方均未證實也未否認，故「傳聞/T3」定性正確。主要保留意見仍在：小摩認為英特爾可能僅做 EMIB 封裝，運算晶粒（N2）與 I/O 晶粒（N3）仍由台積電代工，「轉離台積電」可能只涉及封裝價值而非晶圓製造，摘要已如實揭露。

events.product: Feynman-generation GPU components (I/O die, multi-GPU EMIB package; compute dies stay at TSMC)
events.summary_en: Nvidia (alongside Broadcom) began running test wafers on Intel 18A in early 2025, took a $5B equity stake in Intel in September 2025, then per Reuters in December 2025 paused 18A production tests after yield/performance fell short. In June 2026 The Information reported Nvidia is again assessing Intel for a Feynman-era (~2028) design — early multi-project wafer runs on 18A and a package combining four graphics dies via EMIB, with the performance-critical compute dies remaining at TSMC (Rubin is on TSMC 3nm-class today). No production commitment exists as of 2026-06-11.
events.summary_zh: 輝達（與博通）2025年初開始在英特爾18A跑測試晶圓，2025年9月入股英特爾50億美元，但路透2025年12月報導因良率與效能未達標而暫停18A生產測試。2026年6月The Information報導輝達再度評估英特爾，針對約2028年Feynman世代設計，在18A進行早期多專案晶圓並評估以EMIB整合四顆繪圖晶粒的封裝，效能關鍵的運算晶粒仍留在台積電（Rubin目前採台積電3奈米級）。截至2026年6月11日尚無量產承諾。
events.impact_en: Low near-term volume risk for TSMC — compute dies stay put — but Nvidia using Intel for I/O dies and packaging as a 'proving ground' creates a structural second-source path for TSMC's largest customer by revenue.
events.impact_zh: 短期對台積電量的風險低（運算晶粒未動），但輝達把英特爾當I/O晶粒與封裝的「試驗場」，等於替台積電最大營收客戶建立一條結構性的第二供應路徑。

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: The Information's 2026-06-08 report (echoed by Reuters and TrendForce) that Nvidia is running 18A multi-project wafer runs and evaluating Intel EMIB packaging for a four-die Feynman-era (~2028) design is real and is the latest development as of 2026-06-11, with no denial from either company; the Dec-2025 pause (Reuters/Bloomberg) and the $5B stake (Nvidia press release, Intel 8-K) also check out. Status "evaluating" and impact 2 are accurate — compute dies stay at TSMC (Feynman compute reportedly on TSMC A16), and no production commitment or filing exists.
verdict.note_zh: 查核屬實：The Information 於2026年6月8日報導（路透與 TrendForce 跟進）輝達正以多專案晶圓方式試跑英特爾 18A，並評估以 EMIB 封裝整合四顆 Feynman 世代（約2028年）繪圖晶粒，此為截至2026年6月11日的最新進展，雙方均未否認；2025年12月暫停測試（路透/彭博）與50億美元入股（輝達新聞稿、英特爾 8-K）亦獲證實。「評估中」狀態與影響分數2合理——核心運算晶粒仍留在台積電（Feynman 運算晶粒傳採台積電 A16），目前並無任何量產承諾或正式申報文件。

events.product: AWS AI fabric chip (plus custom Xeon 6); Trainium/Inferentia remain at TSMC
events.summary_en: On September 16, 2024 Intel and AWS officially announced a multi-year, multi-billion-dollar co-investment framework under which Intel Foundry will build an AI fabric chip for AWS on Intel 18A, with additional designs planned on 18A-P and 14A from 2026 onward. AWS's main AI accelerators (Trainium, made with Alchip/Marvell at TSMC) stay at TSMC, but the fabric chip puts a piece of AWS's AI networking silicon on Intel's most advanced node, with reported potential volumes around one million processors per year across the Intel projects in 2026-2028.
events.summary_zh: 2024年9月16日英特爾與AWS正式宣布多年期、數十億美元的共同投資架構：英特爾代工將以18A為AWS生產AI fabric晶片，並規劃自2026年起在18A-P與14A承接更多設計。AWS主力AI加速器（與世芯／邁威爾合作、台積電代工的Trainium）仍留在台積電，但fabric晶片已把AWS部分AI網路晶片放上英特爾最先進節點，2026-2028年相關專案據報年量可達約百萬顆等級。
events.impact_en: First official hyperscaler 18A deal — modest direct volume loss for TSMC, but it normalizes Intel as a leading-edge alternative for AWS and sets up follow-on 18A-P/14A designs that could eventually include accelerator silicon.
events.impact_zh: 首宗官方宣布的超大規模雲端18A合約——對台積電直接量損有限，但讓英特爾成為AWS可接受的先進製程替代來源，後續18A-P／14A設計可能進一步擴及加速器晶片。

sources.title: Intel and AWS Expand Strategic Collaboration, Helping Advance U.S.-Based Chip Manufacturing

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: the Sept 16, 2024 Intel-AWS multi-year, multi-billion-dollar framework (AI fabric chip on Intel 18A + custom Xeon 6 on Intel 3) is real per Intel's official newsroom release, and as of mid-2026 it remains active and in progress — 18A reached high-volume manufacturing (Panther Lake ramp, Clearwater Forest H1 2026) with the AWS fabric chip headed toward volume production, while Trainium/Inferentia stay at TSMC. No denial or cancellation found; the only caveat is that the follow-on 18A-P/14A designs tied to the delayed Ohio fab buildout have slipped, and the "one million processors per year" figure remains an unverified press estimate, so impact_score 3 (modest TSMC leakage) is appropriate.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：2024年9月16日英特爾與AWS的多年期、數十億美元合作框架（Intel 18A 製造 AI fabric 晶片＋Intel 3 客製 Xeon 6）確有其事，且截至2026年中仍持續推進——18A 已進入量產（Panther Lake 放量、Clearwater Forest 2026上半年），AWS fabric 晶片正邁向量產，而 Trainium/Inferentia 仍留在台積電。未發現否認或取消；唯一保留是綁定俄亥俄廠的後續 18A-P/14A 設計因建廠延宕而推遲，「每年百萬顆」屬未經證實的媒體估計，故影響分數 3（對台積電屬小幅流失）屬合理。

events.customer: Sophgo and other Chinese AI/HPC chip designers
events.customer_zh: 算能（Sophgo）及其他中國AI／高效能運算晶片設計公司
events.product: Chinese AI / GPU / HPC chips at 7nm and below (e.g. Sophgo TPU-class accelerators; Huawei Ascend ecosystem already at SMIC)
events.summary_en: After a TSMC-made die was found inside a Huawei Ascend processor, TSMC cut off Sophgo (Oct 2024) and, under a US Commerce Department directive, halted all 7nm-and-below shipments to Chinese AI/GPU customers from November 11, 2024. This forced Chinese AI/HPC designers onto SMIC's DUV-based N+2/N+3 (7nm/5nm-class) lines despite lower yields and ~50% higher cost, and the wall has only hardened through 2025-2026 as Taiwan added Huawei and SMIC to its own entity list (June 2025) and US scrutiny of shell-company workarounds intensified. The structural result: Chinese leading-edge AI demand is now captive to SMIC, not contestable by TSMC.
events.summary_zh: 台積電晶粒被發現用於華為昇騰處理器後，台積電於2024年10月切斷算能（Sophgo）供貨，並依美國商務部指令自2024年11月11日起停止對中國AI／GPU客戶出貨7奈米以下晶片。中國AI／HPC設計公司被迫轉向中芯國際以DUV為主的N+2／N+3（7／5奈米級）產線，儘管良率較低、成本高約五成；2025-2026年管制持續加嚴——台灣於2025年6月將華為、中芯列入實體清單，美方也加強查緝空殼公司繞道。結構性結果是：中國先進AI需求已被鎖在中芯，台積電無從競逐。
events.impact_en: Revenue impact on TSMC is small (China AI was already capped), but this is a permanent, policy-driven order migration that funds SMIC's advanced-node learning curve and accelerates a parallel China foundry ecosystem.
events.impact_zh: 對台積電營收影響有限（中國AI訂單本已受限），但這是政策驅動、不可逆的轉單，等於資助中芯先進製程的學習曲線，加速一個平行的中國代工生態系成形。
