verdict.note_en: Confirmed: the Oct-2024 Sophgo cutoff, the Nov-11-2024 Commerce-directed halt of 7nm-and-below shipments to Chinese AI/GPU customers, Taiwan's June-2025 entity-listing of Huawei/SMIC, and SMIC allocating 2025-26 capacity to entity-listed designers (Sophgo, Biren, MetaX, Enflame, Moore Threads) are all multi-source corroborated, and the wall has since hardened further (TSMC Nanjing VEU revoked Dec-31-2025, replaced by an annual license capped at 16nm+; potential US fine of $1B+ over the Sophgo/Huawei die). Minor caveat: enforcement is not perfectly airtight — pre-cutoff stockpiling and shell-company leakage (e.g. the 2026 Enflame/TechInsights probe) mean some TSMC-made dies still circulate, but the structural direction (Chinese leading-edge AI demand captive to SMIC) holds as of June 2026.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：2024年10月台積電切斷算能（Sophgo）、2024年11月11日依美國商務部指示停供中國AI/GPU客戶7奈米以下晶片、台灣2025年6月將華為與中芯國際列入實體清單、以及中芯2025-26年撥產能給被列管的中國AI晶片設計商，均獲多方來源佐證，且管制持續加嚴（南京廠VEU於2025年底撤銷改為僅限16奈米以上的年度許可、台積電或面臨逾10億美元罰款）。小幅保留：管制並非滴水不漏——禁令前囤貨與空殼公司繞道（如2026年燧原/TechInsights事件）顯示仍有台積電晶粒流通，但「中國先進AI需求被鎖在中芯」的結構性方向截至2026年6月依然成立。

events.product: A20 / A20 Pro SoC for iPhone 18 family (fall 2026)
events.summary_en: Apple is the lead customer for TSMC's N2 (2nm) node, reportedly locking up more than half of initial 2nm capacity for the A20/A20 Pro chips that will power the fall-2026 iPhone 18 family. N2 entered volume production in 4Q25 at Hsinchu and Kaohsiung and A20 output is ramping now, with neither Samsung SF2 nor Intel 18A winning any Apple SoC allocation.
events.summary_zh: 蘋果是台積電 N2（2奈米）製程的首發大客戶，據報已包下超過一半的初期2奈米產能，用於2026年秋季 iPhone 18 系列的 A20／A20 Pro 晶片。N2 已於2025年第四季在新竹與高雄進入量產，A20 正在投片，三星 SF2 與英特爾 18A 均未分得任何蘋果 SoC 訂單。
events.impact_en: A guaranteed high-volume flagship anchor for the N2 ramp; keeps TSMC's largest customer exclusively in-house at the leading edge through at least 2027.
events.impact_zh: 為 N2 量產爬坡提供確定的高量旗艦訂單支撐，並確保台積電最大客戶在最先進製程至少到2027年仍完全留在台積電。

verdict.note_en: Confirmed, with the production-status portion now T1-backed: TSMC's 1Q26 earnings call (April 2026) states N2 entered high-volume manufacturing in 4Q25 with good yield and is ramping in multiple phases at Hsinchu and Kaohsiung on strong smartphone and HPC demand, with N2 revenue starting March 2026. TrendForce and Taiwan trade press corroborate Apple locking >50% of initial 2nm capacity for the A20/A20 Pro (iPhone 18, fall 2026) and continuing to exclude Samsung SF2 and Intel 18A from any Apple SoC allocation; no denials, cancellations, or yield setbacks found as of 2026-06-11, and impact_score 5 is justified.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實，且量產狀態已有T1證據：台積電2026年第一季法說會（2026年4月）表示N2已於2025年第四季進入量產、良率良好，正於新竹與高雄多階段擴產，受智慧手機與HPC需求帶動，N2自2026年3月起貢獻營收。TrendForce與台灣媒體均佐證蘋果包下逾半數2奈米初期產能用於A20/A20 Pro（2026年秋季iPhone 18），且三星SF2與英特爾18A均未取得任何蘋果SoC訂單；截至2026-06-11未發現任何否認、取消或良率問題，影響分數5分合理。

events.product: Nova Lake desktop CPU compute tiles (launch H2 2026)
events.summary_en: Intel has outsourced the compute tiles for its higher-end Nova Lake desktop CPUs to TSMC N2: the tile taped out in 2025 and is in trial production at Fab 20 in Hsinchu, with reports saying the majority of Nova Lake compute tiles will come from TSMC while entry SKUs use Intel 18A. Launch is targeted for H2 2026, making Intel a marquee external N2 customer alongside Apple and AMD.
events.summary_zh: 英特爾將高階 Nova Lake 桌上型處理器的運算晶粒（compute tile）外包給台積電 N2：該晶粒已於2025年完成設計定案，目前在新竹 Fab 20 試產，據報多數 Nova Lake 運算晶粒將由台積電生產，入門款才用英特爾 18A。預計2026年下半年上市，使英特爾成為 N2 與蘋果、超微並列的指標性外部客戶。
events.impact_en: Even as Intel ramps 18A for Panther Lake, its flagship desktop line still leans on TSMC at the leading edge — validating N2's lead and extending Intel's external-foundry revenue stream for TSMC into 2027.
events.impact_zh: 即使英特爾以 18A 量產 Panther Lake，其旗艦桌上型產品線仍倚賴台積電最先進製程，再次印證 N2 領先地位，並讓英特爾外包營收貢獻延續至2027年。

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: Intel's own executives said on earnings calls that Nova Lake compute tiles will be made "inside and outside" Intel Foundry, and as of Computex 2026 (May) reports still say >90% of Nova Lake compute tiles are on TSMC N2 with entry SKUs on 18A — direction and in_progress status hold, with no denials found. Caveat: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan reiterated an end-2026 launch, but Feb 2026 supply-chain reports say the Nova Lake-S desktop retail launch may slip to CES/Q1 2027, so the "H2 2026 launch" detail carries schedule risk; impact_score 4 is reasonable.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：英特爾高層在法說會上親口表示 Nova Lake 運算晶片塊將「廠內與廠外」並行生產，且截至 2026 年 5 月 Computex 期間的報導仍指出逾 90% 的 Nova Lake 運算晶片塊採用台積電 N2、入門款用 18A——方向與「進行中」狀態成立，未發現任何官方否認。但須注意：執行長陳立武稱 2026 年底推出，而 2026 年 2 月供應鏈報導指桌機版 Nova Lake-S 零售上市可能延至 2027 年 CES，故「2026 下半年上市」一項存在時程風險；影響分數 4 屬合理。

events.product: Lunar Lake & Arrow Lake CPU/GPU/NPU tiles
events.summary_en: Then-CEO Pat Gelsinger publicly confirmed that Lunar Lake and Arrow Lake tiles are built on TSMC N3B/N3, the deepest outsourcing in Intel's history with compute, GPU and NPU tiles fabbed in Taiwan. Both families shipped from late 2024 and remain in production today; Intel has since pulled Panther Lake compute back to 18A, but TSMC retained the follow-on Nova Lake N2 business.
events.summary_zh: 前執行長基辛格公開證實 Lunar Lake 與 Arrow Lake 的晶粒採用台積電 N3B／N3 製程，是英特爾史上最大規模的委外，運算、GPU 與 NPU 晶粒皆在台灣投片。兩大產品線自2024年底出貨至今仍在量產；英特爾雖已將 Panther Lake 運算晶粒收回 18A，但後續 Nova Lake N2 訂單仍由台積電拿下。
events.impact_en: Turned TSMC's biggest IDM rival into a major customer and set the precedent that even Intel's flagship clients ride on TSMC silicon — leverage that carried into the Nova Lake N2 win.
events.impact_zh: 讓最大 IDM 對手變成重要客戶，確立「連英特爾旗艦也靠台積電」的先例，並延伸成 Nova Lake N2 訂單的談判優勢。

The follow-on dynamic is also accurate: Panther Lake compute is on Intel 18A while Nova Lake compute tiles taped out on TSMC N2 (~90% reportedly outsourced), so direction and in_production status stand; only nuance is Panther Lake was always planned for 18A rather than "pulled back".
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：Gelsinger 親口公開確認 Lunar Lake（N3B）與 Arrow Lake（N3）晶片皆由台積電代工，截至 2026 年 6 月兩產品線仍在量產（Arrow Lake Refresh 於 2026-03-11 上市、仍採台積電 N3，且英特爾表示需求超過其預訂的台積電晶圓供給）。後續動態亦屬實：Panther Lake 運算晶片採英特爾 18A，而 Nova Lake 運算晶片已在台積電 N2 完成投片（傳約九成委外），方向與量產狀態均成立；唯一細節是 Panther Lake 原本即規劃用 18A，並非「收回」。

events.product: EPYC 'Venice' (Zen 6) server CPU — first HPC product on N2; plus 5th-gen EPYC validated at TSMC Arizona Fab 21
events.summary_en: AMD officially announced in April 2025 that EPYC 'Venice' (Zen 6) is the industry's first HPC product taped out and brought up on TSMC N2, skipping N3 for servers, with launch on track for 2026. AMD simultaneously validated 5th-gen EPYC at TSMC's Arizona Fab 21, deepening the relationship across both leading-edge node and US capacity rather than diversifying to Samsung or Intel Foundry.
events.summary_zh: 超微於2025年4月正式宣布 EPYC「Venice」（Zen 6）為業界第一個在台積電 N2 完成設計定案並點亮的 HPC 產品，伺服器產品直接跳過 N3，預計2026年推出。超微同時在台積電亞利桑那 Fab 21 完成第五代 EPYC 驗證，於先進製程與美國產能雙線加深合作，而非轉向三星或英特爾晶圓代工。
events.impact_en: Locks the #2 data-center CPU vendor onto N2 for the AI-server cycle and showcases TSMC Arizona with a marquee US customer — a direct rebuff to Intel Foundry's courtship of AMD-class clients.
events.impact_zh: 把資料中心 CPU 第二大廠綁定在 N2 世代，並以指標性美國客戶展示亞利桑那廠實力，等於直接回絕英特爾代工對此類客戶的爭取。

events.product: Snapdragon 8 Elite in entire Galaxy S25 lineup (Exynos 2500 dropped); Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 (N3P) in Galaxy S26 US/Ultra models
events.summary_en: Samsung Foundry's 3nm GAA yield problems killed the Exynos 2500's Galaxy S25 slot, so the entire global S25 lineup (Jan 2025) shipped with TSMC-made Snapdragon 8 Elite — Samsung even sounded out TSMC about co-producing Exynos and was reportedly declined. For the 2026 Galaxy S26, Exynos 2600 (SF2) clawed back some non-US variants, but Qualcomm's Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 on TSMC N3P still powers all US models and keeps the majority of the flagship socket.
events.summary_zh: 三星晶圓代工3奈米 GAA 良率問題使 Exynos 2500 無緣 Galaxy S25，2025年1月上市的 S25 全系列全球均搭載台積電代工的 Snapdragon 8 Elite——三星甚至探詢台積電合產 Exynos，據報遭婉拒。2026年 Galaxy S26 雖由 Exynos 2600（SF2）奪回部分非美國市場機型，但採用台積電 N3P 的 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 仍供應全部美國機型，掌握旗艦插槽多數份額。
events.impact_en: Every flagship Galaxy sold in 2025 carried TSMC silicon — a high-volume win taken directly out of Samsung Foundry's flagship showcase, though the S26 Exynos comeback shows Samsung is fighting back at 2nm.
events.impact_zh: 2025年所有 Galaxy 旗艦都搭載台積電晶片，直接從三星代工的旗艦展示窗搶下高量訂單；惟 S26 的 Exynos 回歸顯示三星正以2奈米反攻。

Caveat: Qualcomm CEO Amon confirmed at CES 2026 active talks with Samsung Foundry on 2nm for a future Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 variant — a partial-reversal risk for 2027, not affecting this event.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：Exynos 2500 因三星 3nm GAA 良率僅約 20% 被踢出，2025 年 1 月的 Galaxy S25 全系列搭載台積電製 Snapdragon 8 Elite；高通 2026 年 2 月官方新聞稿（T1）確認 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5（台積電 N3P）通吃 S26 Ultra 全球機型及美/加/中/日的 S26/S26+，Exynos 2600（SF2）僅奪回非美地區基本款與 Plus。注意：高通執行長 Amon 在 CES 2026 證實正與三星洽談 2nm 代工下一代 Gen 6 變體，屬 2027 年部分回流風險，不影響本事件。

events.product: Feynman next-generation GPU architecture (successor to Rubin, mass production ~2028)
events.summary_en: Supply-chain reports since September 2025 say Nvidia will be the first — and currently the only — customer for TSMC's A16 (1.6nm, backside power) node, using it for the Feynman GPU generation that succeeds Rubin, with TSMC's Kaohsiung P3 fab slated to start A16 mass production in 2027 against Nvidia's roadmap. Nvidia has not formally confirmed the node, but TrendForce reported in March 2026 that Feynman details and the A16 supply chain were in focus ahead of GTC 2026.
events.summary_zh: 自2025年9月起供應鏈消息指出，輝達將是台積電 A16（1.6奈米、背面供電）製程的首家、目前也是唯一客戶，用於接替 Rubin 的 Feynman GPU 世代；高雄 P3 廠規劃2027年配合輝達時程量產 A16。輝達尚未正式證實採用節點，但 TrendForce 於2026年3月報導 GTC 2026 前 Feynman 與 A16 供應鏈備受關注。
events.impact_en: Locking the AI-compute king onto A16 would extend TSMC's monopoly on Nvidia data-center silicon into the 2028-2030 cycle and bootstrap the A16 ramp with the industry's largest single customer.
events.impact_zh: 若確定綁定 AI 運算龍頭，台積電對輝達資料中心晶片的獨供將延伸到2028-2030週期，並以業界最大單一客戶啟動 A16 量產。

sources.title: [News] NVIDIA May Be Among the First to Adopt TSMC A16 for 2028 Feynman Architecture - TrendForce
[News] NVIDIA May Offer First Look at Feynman at GTC 2026, TSMC A16 and Taiwan Supply Chain in Focus - TrendForce
NVIDIA Reportedly The First & Only Customer For TSMC's Bleeding-Edge A16 Process Node - Wccftech

verdict.note_en: Direction and "rumored" status hold as of 2026-06-11: GTC 2026 recaps widely tie Feynman (2028) to TSMC A16, but Nvidia's official GTC blog/roadmap names no node and TSMC's 1Q26 call confirms A16 volume production in H2 2026 (not 2027 as the summary says) without naming customers. Newer supply-chain reports (Mar 2026) say A16 capacity is so tight Nvidia reportedly moved some Feynman dies to N3P, and "only customer" framing is eroding as cloud giants chase A16 capacity.
verdict.note_zh: 截至2026-06-11，方向與「傳聞」狀態成立：GTC 2026 後媒體普遍指 Feynman（2028）採用台積電 A16，但輝達官方部落格與路線圖未提及製程節點，台積電 2026 年第一季法說會確認 A16 於 2026 下半年量產（非摘要所稱 2027）且未點名客戶。2026 年 3 月供應鏈報導稱 A16 產能吃緊、輝達傳將 Feynman 部分裸晶改用 N3P，「唯一客戶」說法正逐漸鬆動。

events.product: Next-generation CMOS image sensors — Sony-majority JV with production lines in Sony's new Koshi City fab (Kumamoto)
events.summary_en: On May 8, 2026 TSMC and Sony Semiconductor Solutions signed an MOU (disclosed in a TSMC SEC 6-K) to form a Sony-majority joint venture putting development and production lines for next-generation image sensors inside Sony's newly built Koshi City fab in Kumamoto, with phased investments contingent on demand and Japanese-government support. The tie-up targets physical-AI applications (automotive, robotics) and is widely read as Sony enlisting TSMC process technology to widen its CIS lead just as Samsung breaks into Apple's iPhone sensor supply; a definitive agreement is still pending.
events.summary_zh: 2026年5月8日，台積電與索尼半導體解決方案簽署備忘錄（已揭露於台積電 SEC 6-K），將成立由索尼控股的合資公司，在熊本縣合志市索尼新廠內建置次世代影像感測器的研發與生產線，投資將視市場需求分階段進行並爭取日本政府支持。此合作鎖定車用、機器人等實體 AI 應用，市場解讀為索尼借重台積電製程技術拉開與三星的 CIS 差距——正值三星打入蘋果 iPhone 感測器供應鏈之際；正式協議仍待簽署。
events.impact_en: Pulls the world's #1 image-sensor maker deeper into TSMC's orbit with a first-of-its-kind JV fab in Japan, adding specialty-technology revenue and blunting Samsung LSI's CIS offensive.
events.impact_zh: 以首見的日本合資廠模式把全球最大影像感測器廠更深綁進台積電陣營，增添特殊製程營收，並削弱三星 LSI 的 CIS 攻勢。

sources.title: TSMC Form 6-K: Sony Semiconductor Solutions and TSMC Enter Preliminary Agreement for Next-Generation Image Sensor Strategic Partnership
Sony Teams Up with TSMC to Widen Lead Over Samsung in Image Sensors - Seoul Economic Daily

verdict.note_en: Verified directly against TSMC's SEC 6-K filed 2026-05-08 (the exact cited URL resolves to the real filing) plus matching TSMC and Sony Semiconductor Solutions press releases: non-binding MOU, Sony-majority JV with lines in Sony's new Koshi City (Kumamoto) fab, phased demand-based investment with Japanese-government support, definitive agreement still pending. No denial, cancellation, or newer contradicting development found as of 2026-06-11; the Samsung-into-Apple-CIS context and impact score 4 are both reasonable.
verdict.note_zh: 已直接核對台積電 2026 年 5 月 8 日向 SEC 申報之 6-K（所引網址確為真實文件）及台積電、Sony 半導體雙方新聞稿：雙方簽署不具約束力之合作備忘錄，擬由 Sony 控股之合資公司在熊本縣合志市新廠設置研發與生產線，投資分階段視需求推進並爭取日本政府支持，最終協議尚未簽署。截至 2026-06-11 未發現任何否認、取消或更新的矛盾發展；三星打入蘋果感測器供應鏈之背景與影響分數 4 均屬合理。

events.product: Tesla AI5 (and AI6) self-driving / AI inference chips — dual-fabbed at TSMC Fab 21 Arizona and Samsung Taylor, Texas
events.summary_en: After Samsung's headline $16.5B Tesla AI6 deal raised fears TSMC had lost Tesla, Elon Musk confirmed on Tesla's late-2025 earnings call that both AI5 and AI6 will be made at BOTH TSMC's Arizona Fab 21 and Samsung's Taylor, Texas fab, with slightly different physical implementations of the same design. AI5 has since taped out; first silicon is due in 2026 with high-volume production targeted around mid-2027.
events.summary_zh: 三星拿下165億美元特斯拉 AI6 大單後，市場一度擔心台積電失去特斯拉；馬斯克在2025年底財報電話會議上證實 AI5 與 AI6 都將同時於台積電亞利桑那 Fab 21 與三星德州泰勒廠生產，同一設計做出略有差異的兩個實體版本。AI5 已完成設計定案，2026年出首批矽片，量產目標約2027年中。
events.impact_en: TSMC keeps a share of every Tesla AI-chip generation through AI6 rather than ceding the account to Samsung — a retention win for Fab 21 Arizona, though the business is now permanently split.
events.impact_zh: 台積電保住特斯拉到 AI6 為止每一代 AI 晶片的份額，未將客戶拱手讓給三星，是亞利桑那 Fab 21 的留單成果，但訂單已確定一分為二。

sources.title: Musk confirms Tesla AI5 and AI6 will be made at both Samsung and TSMC - Tom's Hardware

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: Musk did state on Tesla's Oct 2025 earnings call that AI5 is dual-fabbed at TSMC Fab 21 Arizona and Samsung Taylor with slightly different physical implementations, and AI5 taped out 2026-04-15 with volume production targeted mid-2027 — all consistent with the claim. One element is now stale: as of Mar–Apr 2026, AI6 is assigned primarily to Samsung 2nm Taylor (with reports of a Samsung-exclusive capacity expansion to ~40k wpm), while TSMC Arizona 2nm gets the follow-on AI6.5 instead, so "AI6 at both fabs" no longer reflects the latest plan.
verdict.note_zh: 已證實：馬斯克在特斯拉2025年10月財報會上確認AI5由台積電亞利桑那Fab 21與三星德州泰勒廠雙代工（同一設計、實體實作略異），且AI5已於2026年4月15日完成設計定案（tape-out），量產目標2027年中，與原主張一致。惟其中一點已過時：2026年3-4月最新訊息顯示AI6改由三星2奈米泰勒廠主導（傳獨家擴產至月產約4萬片），台積電亞利桑那2奈米改接後續的AI6.5，「AI6兩廠並做」之說已非最新狀態。

events.product: Next-gen multi-die GPU I/O die + custom x86 CPUs / RTX SoCs (Intel-built)
events.summary_en: Nvidia invested $5B in Intel (Sep 2025, T1-confirmed) and is co-designing x86 CPUs/RTX SoCs that Intel will build, but the foundry question for Nvidia's own GPUs remains gray: Reuters reported in late 2025 that Nvidia tested 18A and stopped moving forward, yet by June 2026 Nvidia is again running 18A multi-project-wafer evaluations for a multi-die GPU design (Feynman-era I/O die, ~25% of die work plus EMIB packaging), while compute dies stay on TSMC N2. As of today no Nvidia GPU foundry order has been placed with Intel.
events.summary_zh: 輝達於2025年9月入股英特爾50億美元（官方確認），並合作開發由英特爾製造的x86 CPU與RTX SoC；但輝達自家GPU是否下單英特爾代工仍處灰色地帶：路透2025年底報導輝達測試18A後一度喊停，2026年6月又傳出輝達正以多專案晶圓（MPW）評估18A用於多晶粒GPU的I/O die（Feynman世代，約25%晶粒工作加EMIB封裝），運算晶粒仍留在台積電N2。截至今日輝達尚未對英特爾下GPU代工訂單。
events.impact_en: TSMC keeps the high-value compute dies, but Nvidia is deliberately building an Intel second-source path for I/O dies and advanced packaging — a structural hedge that could grow if 18A/14A matures.
events.impact_zh: 台積電仍掌握高價值運算晶粒，但輝達正刻意為I/O die與先進封裝建立英特爾第二供應路徑；若18A/14A成熟，此避險布局可能擴大。

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: the $5B investment and Intel-built x86 CPUs/RTX SoCs are T1 (Nvidia's 2025-09-18 release, which says nothing about Intel fabbing Nvidia GPUs), and as of 2026-06-11 Nvidia is indeed back in 18A multi-project-wafer evaluation for a four-die Feynman GPU (I/O die on 18A/14A, ~25% of die work, EMIB) with no production order placed — status "evaluating" stands. Corrections: the foundry-evaluation evidence is trade press citing The Information/Reuters (T3, not T1), and Feynman compute dies are reported on TSMC's leading node (TrendForce points to A16, not necessarily N2).
verdict.note_zh: 已確認：50億美元投資與英特爾代工 x86 CPU／RTX SoC 屬 T1（輝達 2025-09-18 新聞稿，但未提及英特爾為輝達代工 GPU）；截至 2026-06-11，輝達確實重啟 Intel 18A 多專案晶圓評估，用於四晶粒 Feynman GPU（I/O die 採 18A/14A、約25%晶粒工作量、EMIB 封裝），尚未下任何生產訂單，「評估中」狀態成立。修正：代工評估部分證據為轉述 The Information／路透的產業媒體（應為 T3 而非 T1），且 Feynman 運算晶粒據報採台積電最先進節點（TrendForce 指 A16，未必是 N2）。

events.product: TPU AI accelerators (reported 3M+ units through 2028)
events.node: Intel 18A/14A-class (foundry) or Intel EMIB packaging only — unconfirmed
events.summary_en: The Information (via Reuters) reported on 2026-06-08 that Google placed an order with Intel for more than 3 million TPUs for 2028 delivery after months of validating Intel's advanced packaging — potentially about half of Google's 2028 TPU output, which is today fabbed at TSMC. Intel shares surged ~10%, but JPMorgan called it 'a storm in a teacup', arguing the dies will still be made by TSMC with Intel handling only packaging. Neither Google nor Intel has confirmed; the scope (full foundry vs. packaging) remains unresolved as of 2026-06-11.
events.summary_zh: The Information（路透轉述）2026年6月8日報導，Google在數月驗證英特爾先進封裝後，已向英特爾下單逾300萬顆TPU、2028年交付——可能占Google 2028年TPU產量約一半，而目前TPU全由台積電代工。英特爾股價應聲大漲約10%，但摩根大通稱此為「茶壺裡的風暴」，認為晶粒仍由台積電製造、英特爾僅負責封裝。Google與英特爾均未證實，截至2026年6月11日訂單範圍（完整代工或僅封裝）仍未釐清。
events.impact_en: If a true foundry order, this would be the largest leading-edge defection from TSMC to date; if packaging-only, it still validates Intel EMIB as a relief valve for TSMC's CoWoS bottleneck and weakens TSMC's packaging lock-in.
events.impact_zh: 若為完整代工訂單，將是迄今最大規模的先進製程客戶轉單；即便僅是封裝，也證明英特爾EMIB可分流台積電CoWoS瓶頸，削弱台積電在先進封裝的綁定優勢。

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: The Information's 2026-06-08 report (echoed by Reuters/Bloomberg) is real and remains unconfirmed by Google or Intel as of 2026-06-11, so "rumored" is correct; however, the preponderance of newer evidence (JPMorgan, DigiTimes supply-chain checks, and TSMC chairman C.C. Wei's June shareholder-meeting remark that he sees no major change in customer behavior) indicates Intel's role is likely EMIB-T advanced packaging only, with compute dies still fabbed on TSMC N2 and I/O dies on N3 — so the "away from TSMC" direction and impact_score of 5 are overstated, and sourcing is trade press (T3), not a quantitative tracker.
verdict.note_zh: 查證屬實：The Information 2026-06-08 報導（路透、彭博跟進）確有其事，且截至 2026-06-11 谷歌與英特爾均未證實，「傳聞」狀態正確；但較新證據（摩根大通、DigiTimes 供應鏈查證、台積電董事長魏哲家股東會表示未見客戶行為重大改變）顯示英特爾角色很可能僅限 EMIB-T 先進封裝，運算晶粒仍由台積電 N2 投片、I/O 晶粒用 N3，故「流失台積電訂單」方向與 5 分衝擊評分被高估，且消息源屬商業媒體引述供應鏈（T3）而非量化調研機構。

events.product: Snapdragon 8 Elite flagship SoCs (Gen 5 'for Galaxy' variant / Gen 6 candidates)
events.summary_en: Since mid-2025 Korean media reported Samsung would fab a 2nm Snapdragon Galaxy variant, and Qualcomm's CEO confirmed at CES 2026 that talks with Samsung on SF2 are real, with design work on a Samsung-2nm compute platform completed — a deliberate dual-foundry hedge against TSMC's 2nm price hikes and capacity squeeze. But by April 2026, reports of SF2 yields stuck below 60% (vs TSMC's 60-70%) put the Samsung allocation in jeopardy: both Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 variants are now reported to be on TSMC N2. The dual-source plan remains alive but unresolved.
events.summary_zh: 2025年中起韓媒報導三星將代工2奈米Snapdragon Galaxy版本，高通執行長於CES 2026證實正與三星洽談SF2合作，且以三星2奈米設計的運算平台工作已完成——目的是對沖台積電2奈米漲價與產能緊張的雙代工策略。但2026年4月傳出SF2良率仍卡在60%以下（台積電已達60-70%），三星份額岌岌可危：兩款Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6據報均改回台積電N2。雙供應計畫未死，但懸而未決。
events.impact_en: TSMC retains the flagship Snapdragon order for now, but Qualcomm has built and validated a Samsung 2nm design path — the credible threat alone strengthens Qualcomm's pricing leverage against TSMC at N2.
events.impact_zh: 台積電暫保旗艦Snapdragon訂單，但高通已建立並驗證三星2奈米設計路徑——光是這個可信的備胎，就足以增加高通對台積電N2的議價籌碼。

Caveat: leaks now point to TSMC N2P exclusivity for Gen 6 (possibly Gen 7 too), so TSMC has lost no volume yet and impact_score 4 is at the high end (3 would be fairer).

events.product: Tesla AI5 self-driving / Optimus / datacenter chip (AI6 to follow same model)
events.node: TSMC Arizona Fab 21 + Samsung Taylor SF2-class (exact nodes unconfirmed)
events.summary_en: Elon Musk confirmed in November 2025 that both AI5 and AI6 will be fabbed at TWO foundries — TSMC's Fab 21 in Arizona and Samsung's Taylor, Texas fab — with 'slightly different versions' per foundry, walking back earlier comments that Samsung might build AI5 exclusively. On 2026-04-15 Musk announced AI5 tape-out, thanking both TSMC and Samsung, with mass production targeted for late 2026/early 2027. This is the highest-profile permanent dual-sourcing arrangement at a US-fab level, alongside Samsung's separate $16.5B AI6 deal.
events.summary_zh: 馬斯克2025年11月確認AI5與AI6將「雙代工」——台積電亞利桑那Fab 21與三星德州Taylor廠各做略有差異的版本，收回先前「三星可能獨家做AI5」的說法。2026年4月15日馬斯克宣布AI5完成tape-out並同時感謝台積電與三星，量產目標2026年底至2027年初。加上三星另獲165億美元AI6大單，這是美國廠層級最受矚目的常態性雙供應安排。
events.impact_en: TSMC keeps roughly half of a fast-growing, high-volume AI chip franchise instead of all of it; Tesla's design-for-two-foundries methodology, if it works, is a template other large customers could copy.
events.impact_zh: 台積電在這個快速成長的高量AI晶片案只能分到約一半而非全部；特斯拉「一設計、雙代工」模式若成功，恐成其他大客戶仿效的範本。

sources.title: Musk confirms Tesla AI5 and AI6 will be made at both Samsung and TSMC (Tom's Hardware)

Tesla Completes Design of AI5 Chip for Self-Driving, Partners with Samsung and TSMC (Taylor Today)

verdict.note_en: Confirmed and strengthened: Musk reiterated on Tesla's Q1 2026 earnings call that AI5 (taped out 2026-04-15) is dual-sourced at TSMC Arizona and Samsung Taylor, with Samsung output targeted H2 2026 and an additional AI4+ chip added at Samsung; no denials, cancellations, or yield issues found as of 2026-06-11. Evidence now merits T1 (CEO earnings-call statements), and the only caveat is timeline spread — volume deployment estimates range from late 2026 to mid-2027, with AI5 going to Optimus/compute clusters before vehicles.
verdict.note_zh: 查證屬實且證據升級：馬斯克在特斯拉 2026 年 Q1 法說會上重申 AI5（2026-04-15 完成設計定案）由台積電亞利桑那廠與三星泰勒廠雙重代工，三星目標 2026 下半年投產，並追加 AI4+ 晶片給三星；截至 2026-06-11 未發現任何否認、取消或良率問題報導。證據已達 T1（執行長法說會發言），唯一保留是量產時程說法不一（2026 年底至 2027 年中），且 AI5 將優先供應 Optimus 與運算叢集而非車用。

events.product: Entry-level M-series (M7-class for MacBook Air/iPad Pro) and low-end/legacy iPhone-iPad chips
events.node: Intel 18A-P (14A discussed for later iPhone chips)
events.summary_en: Ming-Chi Kuo reported in November 2025 that Apple signed an NDA with Intel, received the 18A-P PDK 0.9.1, and is preparing to qualify 18A-P for its entry-level M-series chip (~15-20M units/year), targeting production silicon in Q2-Q3 2027. In May 2026, follow-up reports said Apple started test runs of low-end/legacy iPhone, iPad and Mac SoCs on 18A-P and that a preliminary deal may be close, with later rumors pointing to M7 on 18A-P (2027) and an iPhone chip on 14A (2028). Nothing is signed or announced; all leading-edge flagship silicon remains TSMC.
events.summary_zh: 郭明錤2025年11月報告指蘋果已與英特爾簽NDA、取得18A-P PDK 0.9.1，正準備為入門級M系列晶片（年約1,500-2,000萬顆）認證18A-P，目標2027年第二、三季出貨。2026年5月後續報導稱蘋果已在18A-P試產低階/舊款iPhone、iPad與Mac晶片，初步協議可能接近達成；另有傳聞指M7用18A-P（2027）、某iPhone晶片用14A（2028）。目前無任何正式簽約或公告，旗艦先進製程晶片仍全在台積電。
events.impact_en: Volumes discussed would not dent TSMC's revenue materially, but Apple qualifying a second leading-edge foundry for the first time since 2014 would break TSMC's most symbolically important exclusivity and aligns with US-content political pressure.
events.impact_zh: 討論中的量對台積電營收影響有限，但蘋果若自2014年以來首度認證第二家先進製程代工廠，將打破台積電最具象徵意義的獨家地位，且與美國製造的政治壓力方向一致。

sources.title: Intel moves closer to building Apple's entry-level M-series chips on 18A (Tom's Hardware)
Apple Could Soon Be Buying iPhone and Mac Chips From Old Frenemy Intel (MacRumors)
Report: Intel is Testing Production of Some iPhone, iPad, and Mac Chips (MacRumors, citing Ming-Chi Kuo)
Apple Taps Intel 18A-P For M7 Chip By 2027 & 14A For iPhone Chip By 2028, Claims Rumor (Wccftech)

verdict.note_en: All cited facts check out and nothing has been denied or cancelled, but the event has moved past "evaluating": per WSJ (2026-05-08) Apple and Intel reached a preliminary foundry agreement, and Kuo (2026-05-14) says Intel has begun small-scale test production of low-end/legacy iPhone, iPad and Mac chips (~80% iPhone in the first wave), with ramp planned for 2027. Still no official confirmation from either company, and flagship silicon plus >90% of Apple advanced-node share stays with TSMC, so T3 and impact 4 remain appropriate.
verdict.note_zh: 所引事實均查證屬實且無否認或取消跡象，但事件已超越「評估中」階段：據華爾街日報（2026-05-08）報導蘋果與英特爾已達成初步代工協議，郭明錤（2026-05-14）指出英特爾已啟動低階/舊款 iPhone、iPad、Mac 晶片小規模試產（首波約80%為 iPhone 晶片），預計2027年量產爬坡。雙方皆未正式證實，旗艦晶片與蘋果先進製程九成以上份額仍在台積電，T3 評級與影響分數4仍屬合理。

events.product: EPYC server CPU I/O dies (plus mooted Ryzen APU/Radeon work) on Samsung SF4X
events.summary_en: In February 2025 Samsung reportedly landed AMD 4nm (SF4X) orders — framed as AMD entering 'dual foundry mode' for EPYC I/O dies and possibly APUs/GPUs. By May 2025 AMD walked away, citing process-stability concerns, and shifted the 4nm work to TSMC's Arizona Fab 21 instead. The defection-from-TSMC story fully reversed; since December 2025 Samsung has been courting AMD again, this time for SF2P 2nm, with no commitment reported as of June 2026.
events.summary_zh: 2025年2月傳三星拿下超微4奈米（SF4X）訂單，被視為超微為EPYC I/O die（甚至APU/GPU）啟動「雙代工模式」。但2025年5月超微以製程穩定性疑慮為由放棄，將4奈米訂單轉至台積電亞利桑那Fab 21。這宗「轉單離開台積電」劇情完全逆轉；2025年12月起三星再度遊說超微採用SF2P 2奈米，截至2026年6月未有承諾。
events.impact_en: A clean win for TSMC: the most credible AMD dual-sourcing attempt collapsed on Samsung's process quality, reinforcing TSMC's near-total hold on AMD — though Samsung's standing SF2P offer keeps residual pricing pressure alive.
events.impact_zh: 台積電的乾淨勝利：超微最具可信度的雙供應嘗試因三星製程品質告吹，鞏固台積電對超微近乎全包的地位——惟三星持續以SF2P招手，殘餘議價壓力仍在。

sources.title: Samsung lands orders for AMD's 4nm CPUs as chipmaker reportedly seeks to diversify production (Tom's Hardware)
AMD Reportedly Drops Samsung Foundry in Favor of TSMC's 4nm Production in Arizona (TrendForce)
AMD reportedly walks away from Samsung's SF4X deal (DigiTimes)
Samsung courts AMD for 2nm chips as foundry recovery hinges on new orders (DigiTimes)

verdict.note_en: Reversal direction confirmed: the Feb-2025 Samsung SF4X "win" and May-2025 walk-away were never officially confirmed (trade-press only), but AMD's own T1 releases (5th-Gen EPYC validated at TSMC Arizona Fab 21, Apr 2025; Venice 2nm production ramp at TSMC, May 2026) anchor the TSMC side. As of 2026-06-11 Samsung's SF2P courtship of AMD is still uncommitted, though May-2026 Korean broker reports estimate Samsung won a 2nm notebook-CPU order likely from AMD — watch for this flipping the latest-state framing.
verdict.note_zh: 「逆轉」方向已查實：2025年2月三星獲AMD 4奈米訂單與同年5月AMD抽單均僅止於供應鏈傳聞、雙方從未官方證實，但AMD官方新聞稿（2025年4月第五代EPYC於台積電亞利桑那Fab 21完成驗證、2026年5月Venice 2奈米於台積電量產）佐證回流台積電屬實。截至2026年6月11日，三星以SF2P爭取AMD仍無正式承諾，惟2026年5月韓國券商估計三星已獲疑似AMD的2奈米筆電CPU訂單，後續可能改變現狀。

events.product: Test chips on Intel 18A; EMIB advanced packaging for multi-die ASICs under consideration
events.summary_en: Broadcom has been running Intel 18A evaluations since September 2024; early Reuters-sourced reports said initial wafers disappointed, but by March 2025 both Broadcom and Nvidia were still trialing 18A test structures (behavior/performance, not full designs). Through late 2025 into 2026 the discussion shifted toward Broadcom adopting Intel's EMIB advanced packaging for multi-die ASICs, with sell-side research flagging Broadcom among likely Intel packaging customers. As of June 2026 no 18A wafer order or packaging deal has been confirmed by either company.
events.summary_zh: 博通自2024年9月起評估英特爾18A；早期路透消息稱首批晶圓不如預期，但2025年3月博通與輝達仍持續試做18A測試結構（驗證行為與效能，非完整設計）。2025年底至2026年，焦點轉向博通可能採用英特爾EMIB先進封裝做多晶粒ASIC，券商研究將博通列為英特爾封裝潛在客戶。截至2026年6月，雙方均未證實任何18A晶圓訂單或封裝合約。
events.impact_en: Low near-term volume risk for TSMC, but Broadcom is the key AI-ASIC design house (Google, Meta, OpenAI programs) — any Intel qualification it completes creates a ready alternative path for the fastest-growing slice of TSMC's HPC business.
events.impact_zh: 短期量的風險低，但博通是AI ASIC關鍵設計商（Google、Meta、OpenAI專案）——其任何英特爾認證都將為台積電HPC業務中成長最快的板塊預鋪替代路徑。

sources.title: NVIDIA and Broadcom Reportedly Test Intel's 18A as AMD Also Eyes Potential Deal (TrendForce)
Nvidia and Broadcom continue trialing Intel 18A test chips: Report (Tom's Hardware, citing Reuters)
Securities firm research suggests Intel is on track to garner chip manufacturing and packaging orders from Apple, Broadcom, Google, and maybe even Nvidia (PC Gamer)

verdict.note_en: Confirmed: as of 2026-06-11 Broadcom remains in evaluation mode — 18A test chips (2024-25) plus EMIB packaging interest evidenced by Broadcom job listings requiring EMIB expertise (Nov 2025) and sell-side research, with no wafer order or packaging deal announced by either company; Broadcom's June 2026 Q2 earnings call and Intel's FY2026 10-Q (which still warns 14A may be paused absent a significant external customer) corroborate the absence of a committed deal. Sources cited are trade press citing supply-chain sources, so the evidence merits T3 rather than T2; impact_score 2 is appropriate.
verdict.note_zh: 查證屬實：截至2026年6月11日，博通仍處於評估階段——18A測試晶片（2024-25年）加上EMIB先進封裝的興趣（2025年11月博通招聘要求EMIB專長、賣方研究點名），雙方均未宣布任何晶圓訂單或封裝合約；博通2026年6月財報電話會議與英特爾FY2026 10-Q（仍警告若無重要外部客戶可能暫停14A）皆佐證尚無確定合約。惟引用來源屬引述供應鏈消息的產業媒體，證據等級應為T3而非T2；影響分數2尚屬合理。

capex.note_en: Actual. Company-wide capex (advanced nodes, packaging, specialty), company-reported US$29.76B at the 4Q24 earnings conference (TSMC IR, Jan 2025). T1.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。台積電全公司資本支出（先進製程、先進封裝、特殊製程）共297.6億美元，2025年1月法說會公布（台積電投資人關係）。T1。

capex.note_en: Actual. Full-year 2025 capex about US$40.9B, confirmed at the 4Q25 earnings call (Jan 2026), above the original US$38-42B guidance midpoint (TSMC IR; Data Center Dynamics report of the call). T1.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。2025年全年資本支出約409億美元，於2026年1月第四季法說會確認，落在原先380-420億美元財測區間上緣（台積電法說會；DCD報導）。T1。

capex.note_en: Guidance. 2026 capex guided to US$52-56B (midpoint 54), ~30% above 2025; 70-80% for advanced process (N3/N2 and beyond), 10-20% advanced packaging/mask, ~10% specialty. Announced at the Jan 2026 4Q25 earnings call (TSMC IR). T1.
capex.note_zh: 財測。2026年資本支出指引520-560億美元（中值540億），較2025年增約三成；70-80%投入先進製程（N3/N2及以後）、10-20%先進封裝與光罩、約10%特殊製程。2026年1月法說會公布（台積電投資人關係）。T1。

capex.note_en: Actual. Scope: total semiconductor (DS Division = memory + foundry + system LSI), NOT foundry-only: KRW 46.3T of group total KRW 53.6T capex, ~US$33.9B at 2024 avg ~1,365 KRW/USD (Samsung Newsroom FY2024 results, Jan 2025). T1.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。範圍為半導體整體（DS部門＝記憶體＋晶圓代工＋系統LSI），非僅晶圓代工：46.3兆韓元（集團總資本支出53.6兆韓元），以2024年平均匯率約1,365換算約339億美元（三星電子2024年第四季暨全年財報新聞稿）。T1。

capex.note_en: Actual. Scope: total semiconductor (DS Division), NOT foundry-only: KRW 47.5T of group total KRW 52.7T capex, roughly US$34B (Samsung FY2025 results, Jan 2026, via Investing.com company-news summary of the earnings release). T1.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。範圍為半導體整體（DS部門），非僅晶圓代工：47.5兆韓元（集團總資本支出52.7兆韓元），約340億美元（三星電子2025年全年財報，2026年1月；Investing.com彙整）。T1。

capex.note_en: Plan, NOT a capex-only guidance: Samsung said it will invest over KRW 110T in 2026 in capex PLUS R&D combined (vs KRW 90.4T in 2025, +22%), the large majority for the DS semiconductor division (Pyeongtaek P4/P5, Taylor TX, HBM4, advanced packaging); ~US$73B at prevailing rates. Samsung does not publish annual capex-only guidance. Source: The Elec, Mar 2026. T3 citing company statement.
capex.note_zh: 計畫值，非單純資本支出財測：三星宣布2026年資本支出加研發合計投資逾110兆韓元（2025年為90.4兆韓元，年增22%），絕大部分投入DS半導體部門（平澤P4/P5、德州泰勒廠、HBM4、先進封裝），約合730億美元。三星不公布年度資本支出單獨財測。來源：The Elec，2026年3月。T3（引述公司聲明）。

capex.note_en: Actual. Gross capex (additions to PP&E) US$23.9B per Intel FY2024 Form 10-K; net capex was lower after SCIP partner contributions and government incentives. Total company (products + Intel Foundry). T1.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。依英特爾2024年10-K，總資本支出（不動產廠房設備增置）239億美元；扣除SCIP合資夥伴出資與政府補助後的淨額較低。範圍為全公司（產品＋Intel Foundry）。T1。

capex.note_en: Actual. CFO David Zinsner on the 4Q25 earnings call (2026-01-22): "we made $17.7 billion of gross capital investments" in 2025, below the original $20B target after spending discipline. Total company. T1 (earnings-call transcript, Motley Fool).
capex.note_zh: 實際值。財務長David Zinsner於2026年1月第四季法說會表示，2025年總資本投資177億美元，低於原訂200億美元目標（撙節支出）。範圍為全公司。T1（法說會逐字稿，Motley Fool）。

capex.note_en: Guidance, directional only: 2026 gross capex planned "flat to down slightly" vs 2025's $17.7B (so roughly US$17-18B; 17.5 used as placeholder midpoint), weighted to 1H26 and shifted from shells to tooling for 18A/14A. CFO Zinsner, 4Q25 earnings call, Jan 2026. T1.
capex.note_zh: 財測（僅方向性）：2026年總資本支出規畫較2025年的177億美元「持平至微降」（約170-180億美元，此處以17.5為中值），偏重上半年，並由廠房外殼轉向18A/14A機台設備。財務長Zinsner於2026年1月法說會說明。T1。

capex.note_en: Actual. FY2024 capex US$7.33B per SMIC's 4Q24/FY2024 results announcement (HKEX filing, Feb 2025), roughly flat YoY as the company kept expanding mature-node 12-inch capacity. T1.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。依中芯國際2024年第四季暨全年業績公告（港交所，2025年2月），2024年資本支出73.3億美元，與前一年大致持平，持續擴充成熟製程12吋產能。T1。

capex.note_en: Actual. 2025 capex reached US$8.1B, above early-2025 guidance, on strong localization demand (SMIC 2025 annual report figures as reported by TrendForce News, 2026-03-30). T1 figure via T2 tracker.
capex.note_zh: 實際值。2025年資本支出達81億美元，高於年初指引，受惠中國國產化需求強勁（中芯國際2025年年報數據，TrendForce新聞2026年3月30日報導）。T1數據經T2轉述。

capex.note_en: Guidance. SMIC's 2026 action plan/AGM documents state capex will be held broadly in line with 2025 (~US$8.1B) and above 20% of audited net assets; dividends stay suspended to fund it (TrendForce News 2026-03-30; TipRanks AGM summary). T1 plan via T2/T3.
capex.note_zh: 財測。中芯國際2026年經營計畫與股東會文件表明，2026年資本支出將與2025年（約81億美元）大致持平，並超過經審計淨資產的20%，且為支應投資持續暫停配息（TrendForce新聞2026年3月30日；TipRanks股東會摘要）。T1計畫經T2/T3轉述。

quotes.speaker: C.C. Wei, Chairman & CEO
quotes.quote_en: AI-related demand continues to be extremely robust. The shift from generative AI and the query mode to agentic AI and command and action mode is leading to another step-up.
quotes.quote_zh: 「AI 相關需求持續極為強勁。從生成式 AI 的查詢模式轉向代理式 AI 的指令與行動模式，正帶來另一波需求升級。」
quotes.relevance_en: Signals a fresh, structural step-up in AI silicon demand that anchors TSMC's leading-edge dominance and pricing power against all foundry rivals.
quotes.relevance_zh: 顯示 AI 晶片需求出現結構性升級，鞏固台積電在先進製程的主導地位與對所有代工對手的定價能力。

quotes.speaker: C.C. Wei, Chairman & CEO
quotes.quote_en: N2 has already entered high-volume manufacturing in the fourth quarter of 2025 with good yield. N2 is ramping successfully in multi phases at both Hsinchu and Kaohsiung site.
quotes.quote_zh: 「N2 已於 2025 年第四季進入大規模量產且良率良好，目前正在新竹與高雄兩地分多階段順利擴產。」
quotes.relevance_en: TSMC's 2nm is already in volume production with good yield while Samsung, Intel and Rapidus are still ramping or prototyping, preserving its node leadership.
quotes.relevance_zh: 台積電 2 奈米已量產且良率佳，三星、英特爾與 Rapidus 仍在爬坡或試產階段，節點領先優勢得以延續。

quotes.speaker: C.C. Wei, Chairman & CEO
quotes.quote_en: It takes 2 to 3 years to build a new fab... we expect this [leading-edge supply] to continue to be very tight.
quotes.quote_zh: 「興建一座新晶圓廠需要兩到三年……我們預期（先進製程）供給將持續非常吃緊。」
quotes.relevance_en: Leading-edge supply staying very tight into 2027 strengthens TSMC's allocation leverage, but also creates the overflow opening that Samsung and Intel are actively chasing.
quotes.relevance_zh: 先進產能吃緊將延續至 2027 年，強化台積電的產能分配主導權，但也給三星與英特爾爭取外溢訂單的破口。

quotes.speaker: Wendell Huang (Jen-Chau Huang), Senior VP & CFO
quotes.quote_en: We now expect our 2026 capital budget to be towards the high end of our range of between USD 52 billion and USD 56 billion.
quotes.quote_zh: 「我們現在預期 2026 年資本預算將落在 520 億至 560 億美元區間的高端。」
quotes.relevance_en: A capex push to the high end of USD 52-56 billion shows TSMC out-investing every rival to lock in AI-era leading-edge and packaging capacity.
quotes.relevance_zh: 資本支出朝 520–560 億美元區間高端推進，顯示台積電以遠超所有對手的投資鎖定 AI 時代的先進製程與封裝產能。

quotes.speaker: Lip-Bu Tan, CEO
quotes.quote_en: 18A wafers are now running ahead of internal projections, representing a meaningful inflection in our execution.
quotes.quote_zh: 「18A 晶圓目前的進度已超前內部預估，代表我們的執行力出現有意義的轉折點。」
quotes.relevance_en: Intel claiming 18A execution ahead of plan is its strongest yield signal yet and the foundation of its bid to rebuild foundry credibility against TSMC's N2.
quotes.relevance_zh: 英特爾宣稱 18A 進度超前內部預估，是迄今最強的良率訊號，也是其重建晶圓代工信譽、對抗台積電 N2 的根基。

quotes.speaker: Lip-Bu Tan, CEO
quotes.quote_en: Intel 14A maturity, yield, and performance are outpacing Intel 18A at a similar point in time, and we continue to develop PDKs with multiple customers actively evaluating the technology. We expect to see earlier design commitments emerge beginning in 2026 and expanding into 2027.
quotes.quote_zh: 「Intel 14A 在同一發展階段的成熟度、良率與效能均超越當時的 18A，我們持續開發 PDK，多家客戶正積極評估此技術。我們預期最早的設計承諾將自 2026 年起浮現，並於 2027 年擴大。」
quotes.relevance_en: 14A is Intel's first node aimed squarely at external customers; design commitments landing in 2026-27 would mark the first real encroachment on TSMC's N2/A16 customer base.
quotes.relevance_zh: 14A 是英特爾首個明確鎖定外部客戶的節點，若 2026–27 年設計承諾落地，將是對台積電 N2/A16 客群的首次實質侵蝕。

quotes.speaker: Samsung Electronics Foundry Business (official earnings release, no individual named)
quotes.quote_en: In the second half of 2026, the Foundry Business plans to start ramping up production of the second-generation 2nm process for mobile products, as well as the mass production of 4nm memory products and LPUs for AI and HPC customers.
quotes.quote_zh: 「2026 年下半年，晶圓代工事業計畫開始量產第二代 2 奈米製程的行動產品，並為 AI 與 HPC 客戶量產 4 奈米記憶體產品及 LPU。」
quotes.relevance_en: Samsung moving second-generation 2nm to volume for mobile in H2 2026 shows its yield recovery (reported above 60%) is translating into real ramps that could re-attract big mobile and AI customers from TSMC.
quotes.relevance_zh: 三星 2026 下半年量產第二代 2 奈米行動晶片，顯示其良率回升（傳已逾 60%）正轉化為實際量產，可能從台積電手中重新吸引行動與 AI 大客戶。

quotes.speaker: Samsung Electronics executives (unnamed, on the earnings conference call)
quotes.quote_en: We are conducting an early review for the construction of the second Taylor fab... the second fab expansion is being pursued in parallel with discussions on global customer orders.
quotes.quote_zh: 「我們正提前評估第二座泰勒廠的興建……第二廠擴建與全球客戶訂單洽談同步推進。」
quotes.relevance_en: An early review of a second 2nm-focused Taylor fab tied to global customer orders signals Samsung is preparing US leading-edge capacity directly against TSMC Arizona.
quotes.relevance_zh: 提前評估以 2 奈米為主的第二座泰勒廠並與全球客戶訂單同步推進，顯示三星正布局美國先進產能，直接對標台積電亞利桑那廠。

quotes.speaker: Zhao Haijun, Co-CEO
quotes.quote_en: Strong demand from artificial intelligence for supporting chips directly drove undersupply in the company's power management chip capacity; the 'siphon effect' of AI is leading consumer and IoT clients to seek capacity in mainland China, resulting in order backflow, alongside industry-chain localization demand and price increases.
quotes.quote_zh: 「人工智慧對周邊配套晶片的強勁需求，直接導致公司電源管理晶片產能供不應求；AI 的『虹吸效應』使消費與物聯網客戶轉向中國大陸尋求產能，帶來訂單回流，加上產業鏈本土化需求與價格上漲。」
quotes.relevance_en: SMIC's AI-driven power-chip shortage and order backflow to China shows mature-node demand localizing, pressuring TSMC's and UMC's mature-node share in the China market.
quotes.relevance_zh: 中芯國際因 AI 帶動電源管理晶片供不應求、訂單回流中國，顯示成熟製程需求在地化，壓縮台積電與聯電在中國市場的成熟製程市占。

quotes.speaker: Jason Wang, Co-President
quotes.venue: Q1 2026 results press release / earnings call
quotes.quote_en: Demand for 22nm logic and specialty processes continues to gain momentum, with 22nm revenue reaching another record high and accounting for 14% of first-quarter revenue. By the end of this year, over 50 customers will have completed tape-outs on 22nm platforms for a diverse range of applications.
quotes.quote_zh: 「22 奈米邏輯與特殊製程需求持續升溫，22 奈米營收再創新高，占第一季營收 14%。到今年底，將有超過 50 家客戶在 22 奈米平台完成下線（tape-out），應用領域十分多元。」
quotes.relevance_en: UMC's record 22nm momentum shows its specialty mature-node differentiation is working, easing price-war pressure from SMIC but competing for TSMC's specialty and mature-node customers.
quotes.relevance_zh: 聯電 22 奈米營收創新高，顯示特殊製程差異化策略奏效，雖緩解與中芯的價格戰壓力，但也與台積電爭奪特殊與成熟製程客戶。

quotes.speaker: Tim Breen, CEO
quotes.quote_en: Capacity at our Vermont fab [is] oversubscribed through well into 2027... In the first quarter, we saw a 50% increase in design wins compared to the same period a year ago, with excellent representation across all four major end markets.
quotes.quote_zh: 「我們佛蒙特廠的（矽鍺）產能已被超額預訂至 2027 年之後……第一季設計案贏單較去年同期成長 50%，四大終端市場均有亮眼表現。」
quotes.relevance_en: GF's silicon-germanium/optical-networking capacity sold out into 2027 shows AI data-center connectivity demand spilling beyond the leading edge into niches where GF, not TSMC, sets the terms.
quotes.relevance_zh: 格羅方德矽鍺與光通訊產能售罄至 2027 年之後，顯示 AI 資料中心連接需求外溢到先進製程之外，而這是由格羅方德而非台積電主導的利基市場。

quotes.speaker: Atsuyoshi Koike, President & CEO
quotes.venue: Official press release on NEDO approval of FY2026 plan and budget
quotes.quote_en: With the approval of the NEDO project plan and budget, in the wafer process, we will further improve the accuracy of prototypes and implement measures to increase yield. [The company will] generally release its PDK required for customers' semiconductor designs... steadily progressing toward the start of mass production targeted for 2027.
quotes.quote_zh: 「隨著 NEDO 專案計畫與預算獲核定，在晶圓製程方面，我們將進一步提升原型精度並落實提高良率的措施。（公司將）全面釋出客戶晶片設計所需的 PDK……穩步邁向 2027 年量產目標。」
quotes.relevance_en: Rapidus entering the PDK-release and yield-improvement phase keeps Japan's state-backed 2nm entry on schedule for 2027 — a long-horizon challenger to TSMC's leading edge with a differentiated short-TAT model.
quotes.relevance_zh: Rapidus 進入 PDK 釋出與良率提升階段，使日本國家支持的 2 奈米計畫如期邁向 2027 年量產，以差異化的短交期（short-TAT）模式成為台積電先進製程的長期挑戰者。

kpis.sub_zh: 4Q25 TrendForce 續創新高，與三星（約 7%）差距持續擴大
kpis.sub_en: 4Q25 TrendForce record high; gap to Samsung (~7%) still widening

kpis.label_zh: 確認流失 vs 傳聞
kpis.sub_zh: 僅特斯拉 AI6 轉三星與中國 AI 轉中芯屬確認，其餘為評估或傳聞
kpis.sub_en: Only Tesla AI6-to-Samsung and China AI-to-SMIC confirmed; rest evaluating or rumored

kpis.sub_zh: 7 件進水（Apple A20、AMD Venice、Intel 瓦片、高通、Sony）對 2 件確認流出；AMD 三星 I/O die 案已回流
kpis.sub_en: 7 inbound wins (Apple A20, AMD Venice, Intel tiles, Qualcomm, Sony) vs 2 confirmed losses; AMD's Samsung I/O-die move reversed

kpis.sub_en: Geopolitics 9, momentum 8: Washington equity and policy leverage pulling US AI orders

kpis.sub_en: Google TPU (rumored 3M+ units through 2028), Tesla AI5/AI6 dual-source, AWS fabric chip

kpis.sub_en: Heading past 100K wafers/month in 2026, already sold out; Apple A20 took roughly half

synth.exec_brief_zh:
今天最重要的威脅動態是英特爾：綜合威脅 6.6 分居六大對手之首，動能來自華府持股與政策槓桿多於 18A 技術本身。Google TPU 轉單傳聞（2028 年前逾 300 萬顆）可信度已偏高，Nvidia 正評估把 Feynman 世代 I/O die 與 EMIB 封裝交給英特爾，AWS 網通晶片亦在進行——單件影響有限，方向卻一致，應當成趨勢管理。

實際客戶流向仍明顯對我們有利。確認流失僅兩件：特斯拉 AI6 給三星泰勒廠（AI5/AI6 實為台積電亞利桑那與三星雙供應），以及中國 AI 晶片（算能、華為生態）因出口管制轉向中芯。高通評估三星、微軟 Maia 轉英特爾等多屬評估或低可信度傳聞。進水口滿載：Apple A20 包下約半數 N2 產能、AMD Venice 是 N2 首款 HPC 產品、英特爾 Nova Lake 運算瓦片、高通重返 Galaxy S25/S26 全系列、Sony 熊本感測器合資；AMD 的三星 SF4X I/O die 案也已回流。

節點競賽：N2 良率與爬坡領先，2026 年月產能上看十萬片，4Q25 市占 70.4% 續創新高；三星 SF2 靠特斯拉訂單續命，18A 仍缺外部大客戶量產驗證。

觀察三項：Google TPU 是否從傳聞落地 18A；高通 2026-27 旗艦是否真分單三星；中芯在管制紅利下的 7 奈米擴產速度。
synth.exec_brief_en:
The development that matters most this morning is Intel Foundry. It tops the threat board at 6.6 of 10, driven less by 18A itself than by Washington's equity stake and policy leverage. The Google TPU rumor (3M+ units through 2028) has firmed to moderate-high confidence, Nvidia is evaluating Intel for Feynman-generation I/O dies and EMIB packaging, and an AWS fabric chip is in progress. Each is small alone; together they form a pattern worth managing as a trend.

The actual customer ledger still runs strongly in our favor. Only two defections are confirmed: Tesla's AI6 to Samsung Taylor — and even AI5/AI6 are dual-fabbed with our Arizona Fab 21 — and Chinese AI designers (Sophgo, the Huawei Ascend ecosystem) pushed to SMIC by export controls. Qualcomm-to-Samsung and Microsoft's Maia-to-Intel remain evaluation or low-confidence rumor. Inbound is full: Apple's A20 has taken roughly half of 2026 N2 capacity, AMD's Venice is the first HPC product on N2, Intel's own Nova Lake tiles, Qualcomm back across the entire Galaxy S25/S26 line, Sony's Kumamoto sensor JV — and AMD's Samsung SF4X I/O-die experiment has reversed back to us.

Node race: N2 yield and ramp lead, capacity heads past 100K wafers/month in 2026, share hit a record 70.4% in 4Q25. Watch: whether Google TPU lands on 18A, Qualcomm's 2026-27 flagship split, and SMIC's sanctioned-market 7nm expansion.

threat_ranking.one_liner_zh: 18A 量產加上華府持股與政策槓桿，正同時鎖定 Google TPU、AWS、Nvidia 封裝等美系 AI 訂單
threat_ranking.one_liner_en: 18A ramp plus Washington's equity and policy leverage is pulling at Google TPU, AWS, and Nvidia packaging sockets simultaneously

threat_ranking.one_liner_zh: 出口管制把中國 AI 需求整塊推向中芯：算能與華為昇騰 7 奈米訂單已是既成事實，且受地緣保護不可逆
threat_ranking.one_liner_en: Export controls hand SMIC China's entire AI demand: Sophgo and Huawei Ascend 7nm orders are fait accompli, geopolitically locked in

threat_ranking.one_liner_zh: 以泰勒廠拿下特斯拉 AI5/AI6，再用低價 SF2 爭取高通旗艦雙供應，專攻「第二來源」缺口
threat_ranking.one_liner_en: Won Tesla AI5/AI6 at Taylor and is dangling cut-price SF2 to win Qualcomm flagship dual-sourcing — attacking the second-source gap

threat_ranking.one_liner_zh: 靠美歐在地化與國防、車用長約綁定客戶，搶成熟與特殊製程的「安全供應」溢價
threat_ranking.one_liner_en: Locks customers into US/EU onshore, defense, and automotive long-term agreements, monetizing a 'secure supply' premium on specialty nodes

threat_ranking.one_liner_zh: 與英特爾合作 12 奈米並以特殊製程價格戰防守，蠶食成熟節點毛利而非先進製程
threat_ranking.one_liner_en: Intel 12nm partnership plus specialty-node price competition erodes mature-node margins rather than challenging the leading edge

threat_ranking.one_liner_zh: 日本國家隊直攻 2 奈米、補貼近乎無上限；2027 量產目標仍遠，但已開始接試產客戶
threat_ranking.one_liner_en: Japan's national champion leaps straight to 2nm with near-unlimited subsidies; 2027 mass production is distant but pilot customers are signing
